_tags: Animals_Misc@@动物_其它@@@Other animals not finding a clear category.@@@其他未明确归类的动物。
Amphibian@@两栖动物@@@Technically any amphibian, but most likely used for frogs and toads.@@@从技术上讲指任何两栖动物，但最可能用于青蛙和蟾蜍。
Animals_Aquatic@@水生动物@@@All manner of marine and sea animals, not just mammals, but anything that lives in water.@@@各种海洋和海洋动物，不仅是哺乳动物，还包括任何生活在水中的生物。
Bat@@蝙蝠@@@Bat chirps, echolocation and communicative vocalization. Wings would go under WINGS-MISC.@@@蝙蝠的鸣叫、回声定位和交流发声。翅膀的声音归入 Wings-Misc。
Cat Domestic@@家猫@@@Domesticated house cats. See also ANIMALS-CAT WILD.@@@家养的家猫。另见 Animals-Cat Wild。
Cat Wild@@猫科动物@@@Wild cats as opposed to domesticated cats. Tigers and Lions.@@@与家猫相对的野生猫科动物。如老虎和狮子。
Dog@@狗@@@All Domesticated dogs, excluding wild dogs. Pet dogs. See also ANIMALS-WILD DOG for non-domesticated dogs.@@@所有家养犬类，不包括野狗。宠物狗。非家养犬类另见 Animals-Wild Dog。
Dog Wild@@犬科动物@@@Wild dogs and canines like Wolves, Foxes, Coyotes etc.@@@野狗和犬科动物，如狼、狐狸、郊狼等。
Animals_Farm@@养殖场@@@Domesticated mammals you'd find on a farm. For farm birds see BIRDS-FOWL. See also AMBIENCE-FARM.@@@你在农场能找到的家养哺乳动物。农场禽类见 Birds-Fowl。另见 Ambience-Farm。
Animals_Horse@@动物_马@@@All members of the horse family, including donkeys and mules. See also FOOTSTEPS-HORSE and EQUIPMENT-BRIDLE.@@@马科的所有成员，包括驴和骡子。另见 Footsteps-Horse 和 Equipment-Bridle。

Animals_Insect@@动物_昆虫@@@All manner of traditional insect sounds, crickets, cicada, flies and bees. And singular insect recordings. See also AMBIENCE-INSECT now for dense ambience style recordings.@@@各种传统的昆虫声音，如蟋蟀、蝉、苍蝇和蜜蜂。以及单独的昆虫录音。密集环境风格的录音现在另见 Ambience-Insect。
Primate@@灵长类@@@All members of the primate family except humans. Apes, Chimps, etc.@@@灵长类家族中除人类外的所有成员。如猿、黑猩猩等。
Reptile@@爬行动物@@@All reptiles including snakes, turtles and lizzards.@@@所有爬行动物，包括蛇、龟和蜥蜴。
Rodent@@啮齿动物@@@All manner 'gnawing' animals like rats and mice. Rodents.@@@各种"啮齿"动物，如大鼠和小鼠。啮齿动物。
Wild@@野生动物@@@Any wild animal not explicitly defined by the list, and not domesticated. Wolves and Coyotes now to go ANIMALS-DOG WILD@@@任何未在列表中明确定义且未被驯化的野生动物。狼和郊狼现在归入 Animals-Dog Wild 类别。
Birds_Misc@@鸟类_其它@@@Bird sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合本列表中其他类别的鸟叫声。
Bird Of Prey@@猛禽@@@Birds that prey on vertebrates, especially rodents. Raptors.@@@捕食脊椎动物（尤其是啮齿动物）的鸟类。猛禽。
Crow@@乌鸦@@@Birds in Corvid family, which includes crows and ravens.@@@鸦科鸟类，包括乌鸦。
Fowl@@家禽@@@Landfowl, wildfowl and waterfowl, also poultry. Ground feeding and many water feeding birds.@@@陆禽、野禽和水禽，也包括家禽。主要指地面觅食和许多水中觅食的鸟类。
Sea@@海鸟@@@Birds that live mostly near the ocean. Seagulls, pelicans.@@@主要生活在海洋附近的鸟类。海鸥、鹈鹕。
Songbird@@鸣鸟@@@Specifically singing birds, warblers, robins, thrushes, what you imagine pretty dawn chorus birds.@@@特指鸣禽，如莺、知更鸟、鸫等，即你想象中构成美妙晨间合唱的鸟类。
Birds_Tropical@@鸟类_热带@@@Birds living in tropical locations, jungle and tropical rainforest birds. Parrots and Toucans.@@@生活在热带地区、丛林和热带雨林的鸟类。鹦鹉和巨嘴鸟。
Wading@@水鸟@@@Long-legged, long-billed birds that feed primarily in shallow water. Think Herons and Egrets.@@@长腿、长喙，主要在浅水区觅食的鸟类。例如鹭和鹭鸶。
Creatures_Misc@@生物_其它@@@Creature sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适用于本列表其他类别的生物声音。
Creatures_Aquatic@@水生@@@Giant mutant squids or sea monsters, kraken, leviathans.@@@巨型变异鱿鱼或海怪、北海巨妖、利维坦。
Avian@@奇幻禽类@@@Alien or Fantasy birds, or weird birdlike creatures. A giant mutant parakeet would go here.@@@外星或奇幻鸟类，或怪异鸟形生物。巨型变异鹦鹉归于此。
Beast@@野兽@@@Big four legged creatures and beasts. Wooly Mammoth, a mutant elephant, Mumakil.@@@大型四足生物与野兽。猛犸象、变异大象、猛犸（Mumakil）。
Blob@@黏体生物@@@Gelatinous and gooey type creatures, gelatinous cube.@@@凝胶状与粘稠型生物，如果冻立方体。
Dinosaur@@恐龙@@@Dinosaurs of all types, Jurassic Park.@@@各类恐龙，《侏罗纪公园》风格。
Dragon@@龙@@@Game of Thrones, Lord of the Rings, dragons of all types. See also CREATURES-REPTILIAN.@@@《权力的游戏》《指环王》中各类龙。另见"Creatures-Reptilian"类别。
Creatures_Elemental@@精灵生物@@@Creatures based on elements, rock giants, fire creatures, ice monsters, such a the Balrog, or a Rock Giant.@@@元素生物，如岩石巨人、火焰生物、冰霜怪物，例如炎魔或岩石巨人。
Creatures_Ethereal@@鬼魂@@@Ghosts, spirits, ethereal vocals and wispy movement, apparitions.@@@幽灵、鬼魂、空灵人声与飘忽移动声、幻影。
Humanoid@@类人动物@@@Human sized mythical creatures, so zombies and vampires, elves etc. Troll, Ogres, Orcs. Two legged creatures.@@@人类体型的神话生物，如僵尸、吸血鬼、精灵等。巨魔、食人魔、兽人。双足生物。
Insectoid@@巨型昆虫@@@Giant spiders or other insect like creatures. The creature from The Fly. A giant Tarantula.@@@巨型蜘蛛或其他昆虫类生物。《变蝇人》中的生物。巨型狼蛛。
Monster@@怪兽@@@Godzilla, scary monsters, horror monsters. See also CREATURES-HUMANOID.@@@哥斯拉、恐怖怪物、惊悚怪物。另见"Creatures-Humanoid"类别。
Reptilian@@巨型爬行生物@@@Giant lizards and snakes, large giant hissing monsters.@@@巨型蜥蜴与蛇类，大型嘶鸣怪物。
Small@@小型神话生物@@@Specifically small mythical creatures. Fairies, pixies, small rodent like creatures, etc. Distinguished by small size.@@@特指小型神话生物。如精灵、小仙子、小型啮齿类生物等，以体型小巧为特征。
Creatures_Source@@人声包@@@Source recordings meant for creature design, like prop recordings, human voice packs for design, etc.@@@用于生物设计的原始录音，如道具录音、设计用人声包等。
Crowds_Misc@@人群_其它@@@Crowd sounds not fitting another category in this list. See also MOVEMENT-CROWD.@@@本列表中其他类别未涵盖的群体声音。另见 Movement-Crowd。
Angry@@愤怒@@@Crowds of upset or angry people, as in a riot, protest, a schoolyard fight. See also AMBIENCE-PROTEST.@@@骚动或愤怒的人群，如暴乱、抗议、校园斗殴中的场景。另见 Ambience-Protest。
Applause@@喝彩@@@Crowds where the applause is predominantly featured. Use CROWDS-CHEERING for recordings that are mainly vocals.@@@以掌声为主的人群声音。若录音以人声呼喊为主，请使用 Crowds-Cheering。
Battle@@打斗@@@Crowds in battle, fighting, yelling screaming, dying. If including gunfire, explosions. use AMBIENCE-WARFARE.@@@战斗中的群体，打斗、叫喊、尖叫、垂死的声音。若包含枪炮、爆炸声，请使用 Ambience-Warfare。
Crowds_Celebration@@庆祝@@@Crowds celebrating holidays, parties, rowdy crowds. If not clean, use AMBIENCE-CELEBRATION.@@@庆祝节日、派对的人群，喧闹的群体。若非纯净环境音，请使用 Ambience-Celebration。
Cheering@@人群_欢呼@@@Could include applause, but cheering crowds where the crowd vocals are predominant. Overlap with CROWDS-CELEBRATION.@@@可能包含掌声，但以人群呼喊声为主的欢庆人群。与 Crowds-Celebration 有重叠。

Children@@人群_儿童@@@Relatively clean vocals of children together, playing in a playground, in a school classroom, recess, school hallway. See also AMBIENCE-SCHOOL.@@@相对清晰的儿童群体人声，如在操场玩耍、教室、课间休息、学校走廊。另见 Ambience-School。
Conversation@@谈话@@@A small enough group chat that you can discern words, smaller and less active than a walla. A chatter.@@@规模小到能听清词语的群体交谈，比背景人声更小且活动性更低。类似闲聊声。
Laughter@@人群_笑@@@Crowds laughing, a comedy show, canned television laughter, groups of kids laughing, at a party for example.@@@人群笑声，如喜剧表演、罐头笑声、儿童群体笑声、派对场景等。

Crowds_Loop Group@@循环群杂@@@For loop group type walla, usually performed for or to picture, specific environments, specific callouts. See also ARCHIVED-LOOP GROUP for official loop group recordings.@@@适用于循环群杂类背景人声，通常为特定场景或配合画面录制，包含特定环境声和喊话。官方循环群杂录音另见 Archived-Loop Group。
Panic@@恐惧@@@Distressed crowds, mixed screams and crying and reactions… crowds in a natural disaster or crowds in a giant monster attack...@@@受困人群，混合尖叫、哭泣和反应声…如自然灾害或巨型怪物袭击中的群体。

Quiet@@安静@@@Very quiet crowds, mostly mumbling or murmuring. Like crowds whispering in church or a courtroom scene. See also VOICES-WHISPER for single person recordings.@@@非常安静的人群，主要是低语或咕哝声。如教堂或法庭场景中的窃窃私语。单人录音另见 Voices-Whisper。
Crowds_Reaction@@人群_反应@@@Big Ooos, and Aaahs and Booos, big group responses to events happening. Shocked reactions.@@@大型集体反应声，如"哦——"、"啊——"、"嘘——"等，对突发事件的大规模群体反应。震惊反应声。

Crowds_Singing@@人群_歌唱@@@Singing during sporting events, New Year's Eve crowds singing Auld Lang Syne, Christmas carols. Not large choral music, which would go in MUSICAL category.@@@体育赛事中的合唱、跨年夜人群合唱《友谊地久天长》、圣诞颂歌。不包括大型合唱音乐，后者归入 Musical 类别。
Crowds_Sport@@人群_运动@@@Clean crowds at sporting events, Baseball, football. For mixed ambience used AMBIENCE-SPORT. A sports chant.@@@体育赛事中纯净的人群声，棒球、橄榄球。混合环境声使用 Ambience-Sport。体育口号。
Walla@@群杂@@@Specifically very clean crowd walla, with non-discernible words. See also various AMBIENCE categories.@@@特指非常纯净、词语无法辨识的人群背景音。另见各类 Ambience 类别。
Farts_Misc@@放屁_其它@@@Fart sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不属于列表中其他类别的放屁声。
Farts_Designed@@放屁_声音设计@@@Fake or designed farts, whoopie cushion, flarp, mouth farts.@@@假的或设计好的放屁声，放屁坐垫、Flarp 玩具、嘴吹的放屁声。
Farts_Real@@放屁_真实@@@Real recordings of farts.@@@真实的放屁录音。
Human_Misc@@人_其它@@@Human sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合本列表中其他类别的人类声音。
Human_Blow@@人_吹@@@Blowing air, blowing up a balloon, blowing out candles, etc. See also HUMAN-BREATH for less forceful breathing.@@@吹气声，吹气球，吹灭蜡烛等。力度较轻的呼吸声请参见 Human-Breath。
Breath@@呼吸@@@Breathing, normal to heavy, big inhales, sighs.@@@呼吸声，从正常到沉重，大口吸气，叹息。
Burp@@打嗝@@@Human belches, burps.@@@人类打嗝声。
Cough@@咳嗽@@@Human coughs and coughing.@@@人类咳嗽声。
Heartbeat@@心跳@@@Heartbeats, both literal as in a Dr. office, and stylized or designed heartbeats.@@@心跳声，既包括医生办公室里的真实心跳，也包括风格化或设计的心跳声。
Kiss@@接吻@@@Human kissing.@@@人类亲吻声。
Pee@@尿@@@Human urinating.@@@人类小便声。
Skin@@皮肤@@@Human skin, Scratching, handshakes, skin on skin action, back rubbing, etc.@@@人类皮肤声，抓挠，握手，皮肤摩擦，搓背等。
Sneeze@@打喷嚏@@@Human sneezing.@@@人类打喷嚏声。
Sniff@@闻@@@Human sniffing, smelling.@@@人类嗅闻声。
Snore@@打鼾@@@Human snoring.@@@人类打鼾声。
Spit@@吐@@@Human spits.@@@人类吐痰声。
Vomit@@呕吐@@@Human vomiting.@@@人类呕吐声。
Vegetation_Misc@@植物_其它@@@Vegetation and Foliage sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@本列表中未归入其他类别的植被与树叶音效。
Grass@@草@@@Individual movement of grass elements in a studio or exterior environment.@@@棚内或室外环境中单个草叶元素的移动音效。
Leaves@@叶@@@Individual movement of leaf elements in a studio or exterior environment. Jumping into a pile of leaves.@@@棚内或室外环境中单个树叶元素的移动音效。跳入落叶堆的音效。
Tree@@树@@@Individual movement of tree and branch elements in a studio or exterior environment.@@@棚内或室外环境中单个树木与树枝元素的移动音效。
Voices_Misc@@语音_其它@@@The Voice category is for single voices. Groups of people go into the CROWDS categories.@@@“人声”类别适用于单人声音。人群声音请归入“人群”类别。
Alien@@外星人@@@Weird alien vocals here.@@@此处为怪异的外星人声音。
Baby@@婴儿@@@Very young babies through toddler, non-word vocals, cut vocals.@@@从婴儿到学步幼儿的声音，非词语的发声，剪辑过的声音。
Cheer@@语音_欢呼@@@A single person cheering. For a group use CROWDS-CHEERING.@@@单人欢呼声。群体欢呼请使用“人群-欢呼”类。
Child@@语音_儿童@@@Various vocals for a child or a teenager. For non-discernible vocals for a very young child use VOICES-BABY.@@@儿童或青少年的各种声音。非常年幼儿童无法辨识的声音请使用“声音-婴儿”类。
Crying@@哭泣@@@A single person crying.@@@单人哭泣声。
Efforts@@呼喝@@@A single fight and vocal efforts, single grunts, and things like that. Boxing match vocals, tennis grunts.@@@单人打斗和发力声、单次咕哝声等。拳击比赛中的发声、网球击球时的咕哝声。
Female@@女性@@@Any generic female vocal or dialog or misc vocal that doesn't fit somewhere else.@@@任何通用的女性声音、对话或杂项声音，且不适用于其他类别。
Futzed@@音响化@@@P.A. Speakers, Airport announcements, Hospital announcements.@@@公共广播系统、机场广播、医院广播。
Voices_Historical@@历史感@@@For storing famous speeches, famous news broadcasts, presidential speeches.@@@用于存储著名演讲、著名新闻广播、总统演讲。
Laugh@@语音_笑@@@A single person laughing.@@@单人笑声。
Male@@男性@@@Any generic male vocal or dialog or misc vocal that doesn't fit somewhere else.@@@任何通用的男性声音、对话或杂项声音，且不适用于其他类别。
Voices_Reaction@@语音_反应@@@A single Ooo or Aah and things of that nature.@@@单人的“哦”或“啊”等类似性质的声音。
Scream@@尖叫@@@A single scream or yell, battle cry, agonizing death.@@@单人尖叫或喊叫、战吼、痛苦的死亡声。
Voices_Singing@@语音_歌唱@@@A single voice singing, a child singing. For a crowd, use CROWDS-SINGING@@@单人歌唱声、儿童歌唱声。群体歌唱请使用“人群-歌唱”类。
Whisper@@窃语@@@A single whispering voice. The crowd equivalent would be CROWDS-QUIET.@@@单人耳语声。对应的群体声音是“人群-安静”。
Wings_Misc@@翅膀_其它@@@Wing sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适用于此列表中其他类别的翅膀声音。
Bird@@鸟@@@Bird wing flaps, hummingbirds, pigeon wings. Group or single.@@@鸟翼拍打声，蜂鸟、鸽子翅膀声。群体或单个。
Wings_Creature@@翅膀_生物@@@Dragon wings, fairy wings, any manner of creature and monster wings.@@@龙翼声、精灵翅膀声，任何生物和怪物的翅膀声。
Wings_Insect@@翅膀_昆虫@@@Fly and bee wings, dragonflies, moths, butterflies. Any insect wings. Some overlap and confusion with ANIMALS-INECTS likely.@@@苍蝇和蜜蜂翅膀声、蜻蜓、飞蛾、蝴蝶翅膀声。任何昆虫翅膀声。可能与动物-昆虫类别有重叠和混淆。
Bells_Misc@@钟铃_其它@@@Bell sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合本列表中其他类别的钟声。
Bells_Animal@@钟铃_动物@@@Bells attached to animals, like cow and sheep bells, or a dog or cat collar with a bell on it.@@@系在动物身上的铃铛，如牛铃、羊铃，或带有铃铛的猫狗项圈。

Doorbell@@门铃@@@Mechanical doorbells. Would also maybe electronic doorbells in here as well to avoid confusion probably. Also see ALARMS-BUZZERS for a door buzzer.@@@机械门铃。可能也包括电子门铃以避免混淆。门用蜂鸣器请参见 Alarms-Buzzers 类别。
Gong@@锣@@@A large flat circular disc hit with a mallet. With v8.2 of the list most of these would now go into MUSICAL-BELLS instead.@@@用木槌敲击的大型扁平圆盘。在列表的 V8.2 版本中，此类声音大多已归入 Musical-Bells 类别。
Handbell@@手铃@@@Small to medium hand bells, dinner bells. Musical bells like HANDBELLS and CARILLION now go into MUSICAL-BELLS.@@@中小型手摇铃、餐铃。像手摇铃和钟琴这类音乐性铃声现已归入 Musical-Bells 类别。
Large@@大钟@@@Large bells like a church bell or tower bell, or city hall bells, Big Ben. Any large bell.@@@大型钟声，如教堂钟、塔钟、市政厅钟声、大本钟。任何大型钟声。
Clocks_Misc@@钟表_其它@@@Clock sounds not fitting another category in this list. Also see ALARMS-CLOCK@@@时钟声音，不适用于此列表中其他类别。另见 Alarms-Clock
Clocks_Chime@@风铃@@@Chimes, bells specifically for a clock, Grandfather clock chimes. Alarm clocks would go to ALARMS-CLOCK.@@@钟声，特指时钟的钟声，落地大座钟的报时声。闹钟声归入 Alarms-Clock。
Mechanics@@钟表_机械@@@Clocks winding, complex mechanical clock mechanisms.@@@时钟上弦，复杂的机械钟表机芯。
Tick@@嘀嗒@@@Analog ticking clocks and watches of all sizes, also mechanical stop watches.@@@各种尺寸的模拟滴答钟表，以及机械秒表。
Doors_Misc@@门_其它@@@Door sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@未列入其他类别的门声。
Doors_Antique@@古董@@@Very old sounding doors, as in an old castle or abbey. But massive doors of this type probably to DOOR-DUNGEON.@@@听起来非常古老的门声，如古堡或修道院中的门。但此类大型门可能归入"地牢门"类别。
Doors_Appliance@@门_家电@@@Appliance doors such as oven, dishwasher, refrigerator or microwave.@@@电器门声，如烤箱、洗碗机、冰箱或微波炉门。
Cabinet@@箱柜@@@Cabinet doors, such as kitchen cabinet, tool cabinets.@@@橱柜门声，如厨房橱柜、工具柜门。

Composite@@特殊材料@@@Fiberglass, wood steel combination, doors that don't sound like a specific material. A modern front door. Some confusion or overlap with DOORS-WOOD likely.@@@玻璃纤维、木材与钢材复合门，声音不具特定材质感。现代前门。可能与木门类别存在混淆或重叠。
Doors_Creak@@门_嘎吱@@@Door creaks, wood or metal, overlap with WOOD-FRICTION and METAL-FRICTION, but specifically door creaks.@@@门轴吱呀声，木质或金属材质，与木材摩擦声和金属摩擦声类别重叠，但特指门轴声响。
Dungeon@@传统大门@@@That big old classic wood and/or metal heavy dungeon, castle type door.@@@那种厚重古朴的经典木制/金属地牢门、城堡式大门。

Sliding@@滑动门@@@Manual sliding doors, such as a patio door, sliding shower doors. Electric sliding doors to DOORS-ELECTRIC.@@@手动滑门，如露台门、淋浴间滑门。电动滑门归入电动门类别。

Clock@@钟表@@@Specifically alarm clocks, digital or analog. A bit of overlap with ALARMS-BELL, but clock alarms of all kinds probably best to go here.@@@特指闹钟声，数字或模拟式。与“警报-铃铛”类略有重叠，但各种时钟闹铃声最好归入此类。

Alarms_Electronic@@警报_电器@@@All electronic alarms, pure electronic tone alarms. Home burglar alarms, smoke detectors, etc. Car alarms would go to VEHICLES-ALARMS.@@@所有电子警报声，纯电子音调警报。如家庭防盗报警器、烟雾探测器等。汽车警报归入“交通工具-警报”类。

Acid@@腐蚀@@@Chemical acid burning and sizzling, bubbling. A vat of acid.@@@化学酸液灼烧和嘶嘶声，冒泡声。一缸酸液。

Chemicals_Reaction@@化学_反应@@@Chemical reactions, chemistry set, bubbling, foaming, bunsen burner reactions. Overlap perhaps with LIQUID & MUD category.@@@化学反应声，化学实验装置，冒泡，起泡，本生灯反应。可能与 Liquid 和 Mud 类别有重叠。

Audio Visual@@影视设备@@@Various AV devices such a projector or tape recorder, video cameras here too. Some overlap or confusion with COMMUNICATIONS-CAMERA.@@@各种视听设备，如投影仪、录音机，摄像机也归于此。与 Communications-Camera 有部分重叠或混淆。

Telephone@@电话@@@Old school rotary dial and digital telephones. Technically any telephone that isn't a mobile or cell phone.@@@老式转盘拨号和数字电话。技术上指任何非移动电话或手机的电话。

Television@@电视机@@@Television programs, on and off, channel changes, TV Remote controls. STATIC has its own subcategory here. A television broadcast would go here too. Overlap with VOICES-FUTZED.@@@电视节目、开关机、频道切换、电视遥控器。静电噪音在此有独立子类。电视广播也归于此。与"Voices-Futzed"类别有重叠。
Transceiver@@信号收发机@@@Walkie Talkies, CBs, Ham Radios, all two-way transceivers and radios go here. Put voices into VOICES-FUTZED.@@@对讲机、民用波段电台、业余无线电，所有双向收发器和无线电设备归于此。人声部分放入"Voices-Futzed"类别。
Typewriter@@打字机@@@Old school typewriters, not modern computer keyboards.@@@老式打字机，非现代计算机键盘。
Computers_Misc@@电脑_其它@@@Computer sounds not fitting another category in this list. Printers would go to MACHINES-OFFICE.@@@不适用于本列表其他类别的计算机声音。打印机声音归入"Machines-Office"类别。
Hard Drive@@硬盘@@@Laptop or other hard drive seeking sounds, data reading.@@@笔记本电脑或其他硬盘寻道声、数据读取声。
Keyboard & Mouse@@键鼠@@@Typing on computer keyboard, and mouse movement.@@@计算机键盘打字声和鼠标移动声。
Electricity_Misc@@电流_其它@@@Electric sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@电声，不适合列表中其他类别。
Arc@@电弧@@@A longer movement of electricity, think Jacob's ladder, or a power station switching arc when decoupled.@@@较长的电流运动声，想想雅各布天梯，或发电站解耦时的切换电弧。
Buzz & Hum@@电流噪声@@@Ground hum, buzzes, steady electrical hums, guitar pickup hum, amp hum. Any steady electric hum or buzz.@@@地线嗡鸣、嗡嗡声、稳定的电哼声、吉他拾音器哼声、功放哼声。任何稳定的电哼声或嗡嗡声。
Electromagnetic@@电磁@@@Electromagnetic field recordings specifically.@@@特指电磁场录音。
Sparks@@电火花@@@Think sparklers, or a downed power line emitting sparks, welding... A singular spark would probably be a ZAP.@@@想想手持烟花、或掉落的电线冒出火花、焊接……单个火花可能属于“Zap”声。
Zap@@漏电@@@A short, shocking fast percussive electrical sound. Or a repetition of short fast sounds. A taser is a series of ZAPS.@@@短暂、快速、有冲击力的电声。或一系列短促快速的声音。泰瑟枪就是一连串的“Zap”声。
Equipment_Misc@@器具_其它@@@Equipment sounds not fitting another category in this list. See also TOOLS and OBJECT categories.@@@装备声，不适合列表中其他类别。另见“Tools”和“Object”类别。
Bridle & Tack@@挽具@@@Equipment for animals use. Horse bridle, reigns, leashes, harnesses, dog leashes, saddle straps.@@@动物使用的装备。马笼头、缰绳、皮带、挽具、狗绳、鞍带。
Equipment_Hitech@@器具_高科技@@@Hi-Tech gear, things like spacesuits, complex suits with lots of gizmos or complex parts.@@@高科技装备，如宇航服、带有许多小装置或复杂部件的复杂套装。

Equipment_Recreational@@户外装备@@@Recreational gear, like backpacks, hiking gear, rock climbing harnesses, camping tents. Specifically outdoor recreation. See also OBJECTS-GYM.@@@休闲装备，如背包、徒步装备、攀岩安全带、露营帐篷。特指户外休闲。另见“Objects-Gym”。
Equipment_Sport@@运动装备@@@Gear worn while playing sports, American football shoulder pads, hockey gear, etc.@@@运动时穿戴的装备，美式足球护肩、曲棍球装备等。
Tactical@@军事装备@@@Military and police belts, bandoliers, ammo belts. Military gear, troop gear.@@@军用和警用腰带、子弹带、弹药带。军事装备、部队装备。
Lasers_Misc@@激光_其它@@@Laser sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不属于本列表中其他类别的激光声。
Beam@@光束@@@Steady laser beams, not a laser gun. So a James Bond style laser, a scientific laser.@@@稳定的激光束，不是激光枪。所以是詹姆斯·邦德风格的激光，科学激光。
Gun@@激光_武器@@@Classic laser guns, blasters, laser cannons. That thing that Ben Burtt made famous.@@@经典的激光枪、爆能枪、激光炮。本·伯特使之闻名的那种东西。
Lasers_Impact@@激光_打击@@@Classic laser impact sounds, from blaster hits.@@@经典的激光击中声，来自爆能枪的命中。
Machines_Misc@@机器_其它@@@Machine sounds not fitting another category in this list. See also MOTOR category.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的机器声音。另见 Motor 类别。

Machines_Amusement@@游乐@@@Theme park rides such as rollercoasters and carnival rides. Carnival game machines. General ambiences to go in AMBIENCE-AMUSEMENT.@@@主题公园游乐设施，如过山车和嘉年华游乐设施。嘉年华游戏机。一般环境声归入 Ambience-Amusement。
Machines_Antique@@机器_老式@@@Old mechanical sewing machines, ancient looms, olive presses, a bit ambiguous but a very old mechanical machine.@@@老式机械缝纫机，古老的织布机，橄榄压榨机，有点模糊但属于非常古老的机械设备声。
Machines_Appliance@@机器_家电@@@General appliances, refrigerator, stove, oven, vacuum cleaner... AC and fans have their own category.@@@通用电器，冰箱、炉灶、烤箱、吸尘器……空调和风扇有单独的类别。
Machines_Construction@@机器_施工@@@A machine for construction that isn't a vehicle or a tool. For example a cement mixer, a woodchipper.@@@用于建筑的非车辆或工具的机器。例如水泥搅拌机、木材削片机。
Elevator@@电梯@@@Elevator movement and doors would go here.@@@电梯运行和开关门的声音归入此类。
Escalator@@自动扶梯@@@Escalators and moving walkways would go here.@@@自动扶梯和自动人行道的声音归入此类。
Fan@@风扇@@@Fans of all types, box fans, ceiling fans. For air conditioning use MACHINES-HVAC.@@@所有类型的风扇，箱式风扇、吊扇。空调请使用 Machines-Hvac 类别。

Machines_Garden@@机器_花园@@@Powered landscaping machines, lawnmowers, weed-whackers, edgers, hedge trimmers. See also TOOLS-GARDEN and OBJECTS-GARDEN.@@@动力园艺机械，割草机、除草机、修边机、绿篱修剪机。另见 Tools-Garden 和 Objects-Garden。
Machines_Gym@@机器_健身房@@@Exercise bikes, weight machines, treadmill, all things fitness. See also OBJECTS-GYM@@@动感单车、力量训练器、跑步机，所有健身器材。另见 Objects-Gym。

Machines_Hitech@@机器_高科技@@@Think cool James Bond machines, big elaborate death traps, maybe Rube Goldberg type machines. See also SCIFI-MACHINE.@@@想想酷炫的詹姆斯·邦德式机器，大型精巧的死亡陷阱，或者鲁布·戈德堡式的复杂机械。另见 Scifi-Machine。
Hvac@@空调@@@Furnaces, Air Conditioners. Fans go in MACHINES-FAN. A close up gas furnace flame would go to FIRE-GAS.@@@熔炉、空调。风扇归入 Machines-Fan。特写的燃气炉火焰归入 Fire-Gas。
Machines_Industrial@@机器_工业@@@Big industrial presses, factory machines, industrial robots, any heavy manufacturing machines.@@@大型工业压力机、工厂机器、工业机器人、任何重型制造机械。
Machines_Mechanism@@装置@@@Complex mechanical smaller machines and gadgets, puzzle boxes that open portals to hell. Usually smaller devices.@@@复杂的机械小型机器和小装置，能打开地狱之门的谜盒。通常是较小的设备。
Machines_Medical@@机器_医疗@@@Machines typically found in a hospital, medical lab or Doctor's office.@@@通常在医院、医学实验室或医生办公室找到的机器。
Machines_Office@@机器_办公设备@@@Machines typically found in an office, such as printers and copy machines.@@@通常在办公室找到的机器，例如打印机和复印机。
Pump@@泵@@@Air or water pumps, fish tank aquarium pumps, sump pumps. Air compressors would fall into this category.@@@空气或水泵，鱼缸水泵、污水泵。空气压缩机也归入此类。
Mechanical_Misc@@机械_其它@@@Mechanical sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合本列表中其他类别的机械声音。
Mechanical_Click@@咔哒@@@Short clicks, could be from button presses, things like that. Some confusion and overlap with MECHANICAL-SWITCH.@@@短促的咔哒声，可能来自按键按压等。与“机械-开关”类别有些混淆和重叠。
Gears@@齿轮@@@A toothed cog, turning or grinding gears, complex gear mechanisms. Small clock gears would go in CLOCKS-MECHANICS.@@@带齿的齿轮，转动或研磨的齿轮，复杂的齿轮机构。小型钟表齿轮应归入“时钟-机械”类别。

Mechanical_Hydraulic & Pneumatic@@机械_液压与气动@@@Various hydraulic or pneumatic sounds, like on a self-closing door. Isolated hydraulics and pneumatics. See also DOORS-HYDRAULIC & PNEUMATIC for a complete door.@@@各种液压或气动声音，例如自动关闭门上的声音。独立的液压和气动装置。完整门的声音请参见“门-液压与气动”。
Latch@@插销@@@Latch, as in a briefcase latch, or a luggage latch.@@@搭扣，如公文包搭扣或行李箱搭扣。
Lever@@操纵杆@@@A sliding or switching lever. Train track lever, lever to turn on an electric chair. Old Frankenstein machine levers, breaker levers.@@@滑动或切换的操纵杆。火车轨道扳道杆、启动电椅的操纵杆。老式弗兰肯斯坦机器操纵杆、断路器操纵杆。
Lock@@锁@@@A padlock, bicycle lock, or a locking mechanism. Door locks to go into DOORS-HARDWARE.@@@挂锁、自行车锁或锁定机构。门锁应归入“门-五金件”。
Pulley@@滑轮@@@An isolated recording of a pulley, or system of pulleys.@@@滑轮或滑轮系统的独立录音。
Ratchet@@棘轮@@@That sound a ratchet makes.@@@棘轮发出的那种声音。
Relay@@传动@@@Old train station counting board flipping. A old communications relay board.@@@老式火车站计数板翻转的声音。老式通信中继板。
Roller@@滚筒@@@Like a rolling conveyor belt, or something on a roller.@@@像滚动的传送带，或滚轮上的东西。
Switch@@开关@@@Basic and heavy switches, light switches, power switches. Some overlap or confusion with MECHANICAL-CLICK.@@@基本且沉重的开关，如电灯开关、电源开关。与“机械-咔哒声”类别有部分重叠或混淆。
Motors_Misc@@马达_其它@@@Motor sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@马达声音，不属于列表中其他类别。
Motors_Antique@@马达_老式@@@Old motors, usually combustion, so old oil pump engines, old compressors. An antique gas pump for example.@@@旧式马达，通常是内燃机，如老式油泵发动机、旧压缩机。例如，一个古董汽油泵。
Combustion@@内燃机@@@Non-vehicle combustion engines. Combustion motors, generators. Isolated engine recordings.@@@非车辆内燃机。内燃机、发电机。独立的发动机录音。
Motors_Electric@@马达_电动@@@Non-vehicle electric motors. Any motor that runs on electricity. An isolated electric motor. See also TOOLS-POWER.@@@非车辆电动机。任何以电力运行的马达。独立的电动机。另见 Tools-Power。
Servo@@伺服电机@@@Specifically servo motors, from robot, to radio controlled servos. Clean isolated servos.@@@特指伺服电机，从机器人到无线电遥控伺服器。干净、独立的伺服电机声。
Turbine@@涡轮@@@Turbines, water or air. That classic 'whine' power up and down are usually turbines. A jet engine is a turbine.@@@涡轮机，水或空气驱动。那种经典的"呜呜"启动和关闭声通常是涡轮机。喷气发动机就是一种涡轮机。
Robots_Misc@@机器人_其它@@@Robot sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的机器人声音。
Robots_Movement@@机器人_运动@@@Complex robot movement, servos, possible robot hovering and flying. See also MOTORS-SERVO.@@@复杂的机器人运动、伺服电机声，可能包括机器人悬停和飞行声。另请参阅 Motors-Servo。

Robots_Vocal@@机器人_语音@@@Droid and robot vocals, R2D2 would go here. Any manner of vocalizing robot. More expressive than a beep/UI. Robot language.@@@机器人和机器人语音，R2D2的声音归为此类。任何形式的机器人发声。比哔哔声/Ui 声更具表现力。机器人语言。
User Interface_Misc@@用户界面_其它@@@User Interface sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@本列表中未归入其他类别的用户界面音效。
Alert@@警告@@@An alert tone or chime or notification. Something that gets Attention of User, startup chimes.@@@提示音、钟声或通知音。用于引起用户注意的声音，启动提示音。
Beep@@提示音@@@Interface beeps, beeps while interacting with various technology, phones, computers. Also see BEEPS category.@@@界面交互音效，与各种技术设备（如电话、电脑）互动时发出的哔哔声。另请参阅 Beeps 类别。
User Interface_Click@@点击@@@Typing clicks, button press clicks, response to input.@@@打字点击声、按键点击声、输入响应音。
Data@@数据@@@User interface calculations, scanning, thinking, text displayed on screen. Screen gak or garble.@@@用户界面计算、扫描、思考、屏幕文字显示音效。屏幕故障或乱码音。
Glitch@@故障@@@On Screen Glitches or Static. Malfunctioning computer or OS.@@@屏幕故障或静电干扰音。电脑或操作系统故障音效。
Motion@@动态@@@User interface slides, swipes, scrolls. Open, Close, Appear, DIsappear.@@@用户界面滑动、轻扫、滚动音效。打开、关闭、出现、消失音效。
Ceramics_Misc@@陶瓷_其它@@@Ceramics sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适用于本列表中其他类别的陶瓷声音。

Ceramics_Break@@陶瓷_打破@@@Ceramics break of a more singular nature, a plate shatter, breaking, cracking, crunching. Mostly for single items breaking. See also CERAMICS-CRASH & DEBRIS.@@@更具单一性质的陶瓷破碎声，如盘子碎裂、破裂、开裂、嘎吱作响。主要用于单个物品破碎。另见 Ceramics-Crash 和 Debris。
Ceramics_Crash & Debris@@陶瓷_碎片@@@Ceramics destruction of more of a group nature, multiple crashes and debris. See also CERAMICS-BREAK.@@@更具群体性质的陶瓷损毁声，多次撞击和碎片声。另见 Ceramics-Break。
Ceramics_Friction@@陶瓷_挤压@@@Ceramics friction, scraping, squeaking, screeching.@@@陶瓷摩擦声，刮擦声，吱吱声，刺耳声。
Ceramics_Handle@@陶瓷_抓取@@@Ceramics handling, picking up a coffee mug, handling a plant pot. Some overlap with CERAMICS-MOVEMENT.@@@陶瓷拿放声，拿起咖啡杯，搬动花盆。与 Ceramics-Movement 类别有部分重叠。
Ceramics_Impact@@陶瓷_打击@@@Ceramics impacts without breaking, so hits drops, clunks and clinks. See also CERAMICS-BREAK.@@@陶瓷撞击声但未破碎，如敲击、掉落、沉闷的碰撞声和叮当声。另见 Ceramics-Break。
Ceramics_Movement@@陶瓷_移动@@@Ceramics single or group movement, so dragging, shaking and rattling. See also CERAMICS-HANDLE.@@@陶瓷单个或群体移动声，如拖动、摇晃和嘎啦声。另见 Ceramics-Handle。
Ceramics_Tonal@@陶瓷_音乐性@@@Ceramics ringing, as in being bowed.@@@陶瓷鸣响声，如被弓拉响。
Chains_Misc@@链条_其它@@@Chain sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适用于本列表中其他类别的链条声音。
Chains_Break@@链条_打破@@@Chain snapping or breaking, that sharp sound of a chain failing.@@@链条断裂声，链条失效时那种尖锐的声音。
Chains_Handle@@链条_抓取@@@Chain handling, repairing a bike chain, a prisoner moving around in chains. Some overlap with CHAINS-MOVEMENT.@@@链条操作声，修理自行车链条，囚犯戴着镣铐走动。与 Chains-Movement 类别有部分重叠。
Chains_Impact@@打中@@@Chain impacts, such a big chain hit or slam, or a tension snap of a chain being pulled taut.@@@链条撞击声，例如大链条的撞击或猛击声，或链条被拉紧时的张力断裂声。
Chains_Movement@@链条_移动@@@Chain handling, particularly being pulled through pulleys or across surfaces. See also CHAINS-HANDLE.@@@链条操作声，特指通过滑轮拉动或穿过表面。另见 Chains-Handle。
Cloth_Misc@@布料_其它@@@Cloth sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@布料声音，不适用于此列表中其他类别。
Flap@@布料_抖动@@@Cloth flapping, as in a flag flapping, or superman's cape. Also ship sails and parachutes.@@@布料拍打声，如旗帜飘扬，或超人的披风。也包括船帆和降落伞。

Cloth_Handle@@布料_抓取@@@Cloth handling, grabbing a jacket, clothy arm grabs, etc. Some overlap with CLOTH-MOVEMENT. See also possibly OBJECTS-FASHION.@@@布料处理声，抓起夹克、布料手臂抓取等。与 Cloth-Movement 有部分重叠。另请参见 Objects-Fashion。
Cloth_Impact@@布料_打击@@@Cloth impacts, throwing a jacket forcefully to the floor, a wet towel snap. Some overlap with CLOTH-MOVEMENT possible.@@@布料撞击声，用力将夹克扔到地板上，湿毛巾抽打声。可能与 Cloth-Movement 有部分重叠。
Cloth_Movement@@布料_移动@@@Varied cloth movement except flapping which has its own category. Variety of cloth movement. Cloth zuzz. See also CLOTH-FLAP.@@@除拍打（自有类别）外的各种布料移动声。多种布料移动声。布料窸窣声。另见 Cloth-Flap。
Cloth_Rip@@布料_撕扯@@@Various cloth rips and tears, short to long. Velcro would best fit here too.@@@各种布料撕裂声，从短到长。魔术贴也最适合归入此类。
Fight_Misc@@打斗_其它@@@Fight sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不属于列表中其他类别的打斗声。
Bodyfall@@跌倒@@@Bodyfalls, but probably also body scuffles on ground, from simple to complex. On any surface.@@@身体倒地声，但也可能包括身体在地面上的简单到复杂的摩擦声。适用于任何表面。
Fight_Cloth@@衣服@@@Active or big scuffling cloth, big fight cloth movement.@@@活跃或大幅度的布料摩擦声，打斗时的大幅布料移动声。
Grab@@抓握@@@Big arm grabs, hand or arm blocks as well as they're similar sounds, grappling during wrestling or martial arts.@@@大幅度的抓臂、手或手臂格挡声，以及类似的声音，如摔跤或武术中的擒拿声。
Fight_Impact@@打斗_击打@@@Fight impacts, blocks, kicks and punches. BODYFALLS has its own subcategory here, as do GRABS.@@@打斗撞击声、格挡声、踢打声和拳击声。Bodyfalls（身体倒地）和 Grabs（抓取）在此处有各自的子类别。
Footsteps_Misc@@脚步_其它@@@Footstep sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@脚步声，不适用于列表中其他类别。

Footsteps_Animal@@脚步_动物@@@Individual animal footsteps, dog, elephant. Group animals like a herd or stampede to MOVEMENT-ANIMALS. See also FOOTSTEPS-HORSE,@@@单个动物的脚步声，如狗、大象。群体动物如兽群或奔逃请归入 Movement-Animals。另见 Footsteps-Horse。
Footsteps_Creature@@怪物@@@Monster feet, Put dinosaur feet in here too, but also for small fantasy creatures.@@@怪兽的脚，恐龙脚也放在这里，但也适用于小型奇幻生物。
Footsteps_Horse@@脚步_马@@@All manner of horse feet, from single to running.@@@各种马的脚步声，从单步到奔跑。
Footsteps_Human@@脚步_人类@@@Human feet, any surface, barefoot, shoes, it all goes here.@@@人类脚步，任何表面，赤脚，穿鞋，都归于此。
Glass_Misc@@玻璃_其它@@@Glass sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@玻璃声音，不适用于列表中其他类别。
Glass_Break@@玻璃_打破@@@Glass singular breaks, so a bottle smash, or a window shatter.@@@玻璃单次破碎，如瓶子碎裂或窗户破碎。
Glass_Crash & Debris@@玻璃_碎片@@@Glass crashes and debris, so multiple items crashing, and isolated glass shards and debris.@@@玻璃撞击和碎片，即多个物品撞击，以及单独的玻璃碎片和残骸声。

Burn@@血_燃烧@@@Gore flesh sizzling, possible overlap with FIRE-SIZZLING, but this more exaggerated for flesh burning.@@@血肉烧灼嘶嘶声，可能与火焰嘶嘶声重叠，但此类更夸张地表现肉体燃烧。
Flesh@@血肉@@@Gore flesh tearing, ripping, peeling. Very graphic flesh sounds. A monster ripping someone apart.@@@血肉撕裂音效，撕扯、剥皮的声音。非常具象的肉体声响。如怪物撕碎人体。
Ooze@@渗血@@@Gore gross oozing liquid, open wounds, possible overlap with LIQUID categories, but this hyperreal and over the top.@@@恶心粘液渗出音，开放伤口声，可能与液体类别重叠，但此类追求超现实夸张效果。
Gore_Source@@血_原始录音@@@Recordings meant as source for GORE sounds, smashing a watermelon, stabbing a pumpkin, etc.@@@用作血腥音效源的录音，如砸西瓜、刺南瓜等。
Gore_Splat@@洒溅@@@Gore splats, gross splats of gooey stuff. A body or head exploding and hitting the wall. Hyperreal.@@@血肉飞溅音，粘稠物质的恶心溅射声。身体或头部爆裂撞击墙壁。超现实风格。

Rubber_Movement@@橡胶_移动@@@Rubber movement, dragging rubber or drag on rubber. Rubber flapping. See also RUBBER-HANDLE.@@@橡胶移动，拖动橡胶或橡胶上的拖拽声。橡胶拍打声。另见 Rubber-Handle。

Wood_Friction@@木头_挤压@@@Wood stress, especially creaks. But also scrapes, squeaks.@@@木材受压的声音，特别是嘎吱声。也包括刮擦声、吱呀声。

Dirt & Sand_Movement@@沙土_移动@@@Pouring, flowing of dirt or sand, a big sand pour. See also DIRT & SAND-HANDLE.@@@泥土或沙土的倾倒、流动声，如大量沙土倾泻。另请参阅"泥土与沙土-处理"。
