Fire_Misc@@火_其它@@@Fire sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不属于列表中其他类别的火焰声。

Burning@@火_燃烧@@@Covers normal fire burning, mostly roars, not isolate fire crackle, which have their own category. See also new FIRE-TURBULENT category.@@@涵盖正常的火焰燃烧声，主要是火焰轰鸣声，不包括独立的火焰噼啪声，后者有单独的类别。另见新的 Fire-Turbulent（湍流火焰）类别。

Fire_Burst@@爆燃@@@A sharp and loud release of fire, covers fire bursts, big flare ups. Think a backdraft explosion of fire. A flamethrower. Usually a single event.@@@尖锐而响亮的火焰喷射声，涵盖火焰爆发、大火突然窜起。想象一下回燃爆炸或火焰喷射器。通常是单个事件。
Crackle@@爆裂@@@Specifically crackly fire elements, isolated crackle, or a very crackly fire, good for layering to other fire.@@@特指噼啪作响的火焰元素，独立的噼啪声，或非常噼啪作响的火焰，适合与其他火焰声叠加。
Gas@@气体@@@Gas burners as you'd find in a kitchen stove or gas grill. That sort of hissy or airy fire burn. Crematoriums and furnaces.@@@厨房炉灶或燃气烧烤架上的燃气燃烧器声。那种嘶嘶或带空气感的火焰燃烧声。火葬场和熔炉的声音。
Ignite@@点火@@@Fire ignites, including matches, lighters. That initial spark of ignition of a fire.@@@火焰点燃声，包括火柴、打火机。火焰点燃时最初的火花声。
Sizzle@@滋滋声@@@Glowing red pokers, fuses, coal embers when extinguished, sauna rocks when water is poured on them. Glowing red hot.@@@烧红的拨火棍、导火索、熄灭的煤块余烬、水浇在桑拿石上的声音。烧得通红的状态。
Torch@@火炬@@@Constant torches and torch movement, that phasey fire sound as a torch is moved around.@@@持续的火炬声和火炬移动声，火炬移动时产生的相位变化的火焰声。
Fire_Turbulent@@汹涌火势@@@Wildly whooshing turbulent violent fire. Larger than just burning, think fire tornado. Extreme moving fire.@@@狂野呼啸、湍流、猛烈的火焰声。比普通燃烧更剧烈，想象火龙卷。极端移动的火焰。
Fire_Whoosh@@火_呼呼声@@@Big whooshy fire events like a fireball through the air.@@@大型呼啸的火焰事件，如空中飞过的火球。
Geothermal_Misc@@地热_其它@@@Geothermal sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@地热声音，不适用于列表中其他类别。
Fumarole@@热浆@@@Geothermal steam vent. A hole, crack or fizzure releasing gases.@@@地热蒸汽喷口。释放气体的孔洞、裂缝或裂隙。
Geyser@@间歇泉@@@Geysers and eruptions, as you'd find in Yellowstone.@@@间歇泉和喷发，如在黄石公园所见。
Lava@@岩浆@@@Lava flows, crackles, could be some overlap with FIRE, but overtly lava sounding things go here.@@@熔岩流动、噼啪声，可能与 Fire 类别有重叠，但明显属于熔岩音效的归于此。
Mud Pots@@泥浆@@@Mudpots and paint pots, popping liquidy mud sounds.@@@泥沸泉和彩池，冒泡的液态泥浆声。
Ice_Misc@@冰_其它@@@Ice sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不属于本列表中其他类别的冰声。
Ice_Break@@打碎@@@Ice cracks, breaks, shatters. Any ice breaking that is fairly singular or isolated, large or small.@@@冰裂声，破裂声，粉碎声。任何相对单一或孤立的冰裂声，无论大小。
Ice_Crash & Debris@@冰_碎片@@@Ice large crashes and isolated debris go here. Iceberg calving.@@@大型冰体崩塌声和孤立的冰碎片声归于此。冰山崩解声。
Ice_Friction@@冰_挤压@@@Dry ice may go here, but often it's a metallic sound too, but ice scrapes, squeaks, creaks.@@@干冰声可能归于此，但通常也带有金属声，此外还有冰的刮擦声、吱吱声、嘎吱声。
Ice_Handle@@冰_抓取@@@Ice handling, picking up ice. Some overlap with ICE-MOVEMENT possible.@@@处理冰的声音，拾取冰块声。可能与 Ice-Movement 类别有部分重叠。
Ice_Impact@@冰_打击@@@Pieces of ice dropping (without breaking). Ice hits, solid ice impacts that don't break.@@@冰块掉落（未碎裂）。冰块撞击，未碎裂的坚实冰块冲击声。
Ice_Movement@@冰_移动@@@Ice sliding or rattling, maybe an object sliding across ice. See also ICE-HANDLE.@@@冰块滑动或嘎嘎作响，可能是物体在冰面上滑过。另见 Ice-Handle。
Ice_Tonal@@冰_音乐性@@@Tonal ice sounds, probably fairly rare, but that ice ping on a frozen lake would be one example.@@@有音调的冰声，可能相当罕见，但结冰湖面上的那种冰鸣声就是一个例子。
Liquid & Mud_Misc@@液体与流体_其它@@@Mud and thicker than water sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不属于本列表中其他类别的泥浆及比水稠液体声。
Liquid & Mud_Bubbles@@液体与流体_气泡@@@Mud and thicker than water, thick bubbles, viscous liquid. Things like Oil, gloopy thick liquids.@@@泥浆及比水稠的液体，浓稠的气泡声，粘性液体。类似油、粘稠浓液体的声音。
Liquid & Mud_Impact@@液体与流体_打击@@@Mud and thicker than water, Splats and hit. Things like Oil, gloopy thick liquids.@@@泥浆及比水稠的液体，泼溅和撞击声。类似油、粘稠浓液体的声音。
Liquid & Mud_Movement@@液体与流体_移动@@@Mud and thicker than water, oozing, slime, glooping. Things like Oil, gloopy thick liquids.@@@泥浆及比水稠的液体，渗出、粘液、咕嘟声。类似油、粘稠浓液体的声音。
Liquid & Mud_Suction@@液体与流体_抽吸@@@Thicker than water, disgusting liquidy suction, plunger sucks. Things like Oil, gloopy thick liquids.@@@比水稠的液体，令人作呕的液体吸吮声，活塞抽吸声。类似油、粘稠浓液体的声音。
Natural Disaster_Misc@@自然灾害_其它@@@Natural Disaster sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合本列表中其他类别的自然灾害声音。

Avalanche@@雪崩@@@Composite big movements of sliding, falling earth, landslides, mudslides. This category often for big hollywood versions of these types of sound.@@@复合的大型滑动、下落、泥土、山体滑坡、泥石流音效。此类别通常用于好莱坞大片中此类声音的宏大版本。
Earthquake@@地震@@@Composite and complex earthquake rumbles and rattles. This category often for big hollywood versions of these types of sound.@@@复合且复杂的地震隆隆声和震动声。此类别通常用于好莱坞大片中此类声音的宏大版本。
Tornado@@龙卷风@@@Composite tornado sounds, layered and created massive tornadoes. This category often for big hollywood versions of these types of sound.@@@复合的龙卷风音效，分层制作的大型龙卷风。此类别通常用于好莱坞大片中此类声音的宏大版本。
Tsunami@@热带风暴@@@Composite tidal wave or tsunami scenes, layered and created. This category often for big hollywood versions of these types of sound.@@@复合的海啸或巨浪场景音效，分层制作。此类别通常用于好莱坞大片中此类声音的宏大版本。

Typhoon@@台风@@@Composite typhoons, cyclones or hurricanes. Massive swirling storms. This category often for big hollywood versions of these types of sound.@@@复合的台风、气旋或飓风音效。巨大的旋转风暴。此类别通常用于好莱坞大片中此类声音的宏大版本。

Volcano@@火山喷发@@@Composite big volcano eruptions. Lava, lava bombs, eruptions. This category often for big hollywood versions of these types of sound. See also GEOTHERMAL-LAVA.@@@复合的大型火山喷发音效。熔岩、熔岩弹、喷发。此类别通常用于好莱坞大片中此类声音的宏大版本。另见 Geothermal-Lava 类别。
Rain_Cloth@@布料@@@Rain on cloth, like a person's clothes, or more likely a patio umbrella, awning.@@@雨落在布料上的声音，如人的衣物，或更可能是露台伞、雨篷上。
Concrete@@水泥@@@Rain on asphalt or concrete or patio tile. Rain on a hard slappy solid surface.@@@雨落在沥青、混凝土或露台地砖上的声音。雨落在坚硬、拍打感强的固体表面上。
Rain_General@@雨_通用@@@General downpour, rain on mixed materials.@@@一般性倾盆大雨，雨落在混合材料上的声音。
Rain_Glass@@玻璃@@@Rain on a glass roof like a sunroof, or rain blown against a window as well.@@@雨落在玻璃屋顶（如天窗）上的声音，也包括雨被风吹打在窗户上的声音。
Rain_Interior@@雨_车内@@@Interior recordings of Rain, from inside house or barn, or vehicle.@@@雨的内部录音，从房屋、谷仓或车辆内部录制。
Rain_Metal@@雨_金属@@@Rain on a metal surface, so exterior rain on a car, or metal sheet, metal roof.@@@雨落在金属表面的声音，即外部雨水落在汽车、金属板、金属屋顶上。
Rain_Plastic@@雨_塑料@@@Rain on plastic or vinyl surfaces, like a grill cover, or a plastic shed.@@@雨落在塑料或乙烯基表面的声音，如烤架罩或塑料棚屋上。
Rain_Vegetation@@雨_植物@@@Rain on plants, leaves and grass. Jungle or tropical rain on plant leaves.@@@雨落在植物、树叶和草地上。丛林或热带雨落在植物叶片上。
Rain_Water@@水@@@Rain on water, puddles, lakes, ponds.@@@雨落在水面、水坑、湖泊、池塘上。
Rain_Wood@@雨_木质@@@Rain on wood surfaces, so a deck for example.@@@雨落在木质表面，例如甲板上。
Rocks_Misc@@岩石_其它@@@Rock sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的岩石声音。
Rocks_Break@@岩石_断裂@@@Rock cracks, breaks, rips or shatters. More isolated and singular cracks and breaks.@@@岩石开裂、断裂、撕裂或粉碎声。更孤立和单一的裂缝与断裂声。

Rocks_Crash & Debris@@岩石_碎片@@@Rock crashes and debris, so a huge rock crash, collapse. Or isolated debris. See also NATURAL DISASTER-AVALANCHE.@@@岩石崩塌和碎片声，例如巨大的岩石崩塌、坍塌声。或孤立的碎片声。另请参阅 Natural Disaster-Avalanche。
Rocks_Friction@@岩石_挤压@@@Rock creaks, scrapes... the stress of rock about to break.@@@岩石吱嘎声、刮擦声……岩石即将断裂时的应力声。
Rocks_Handle@@岩石_抓取@@@Rock handing, picking up or digging through rocks, bricks. Some overlap with ROCKS-MOVEMENT possible.@@@岩石处理声，拾取或挖掘岩石、砖块的声音。可能与 Rocks-Movement 类别有部分重叠。
Rocks_Impact@@岩石_打击@@@Rock falling, dropping without breaking, or something hit with a rock, a big rock impact.@@@岩石坠落、掉落但未破碎的声音，或用岩石击打某物、巨大岩石撞击的声音。
Rocks_Movement@@岩石_移动@@@Rock dragging, or dragging across a rock surface, rocks shaking or rattling. See also ROCKS-HANDLE.@@@岩石拖拽声，或在岩石表面拖拽的声音，岩石摇晃或嘎嘎作响的声音。另请参阅 Rocks-Handle。
Rocks_Tonal@@岩石_音乐性@@@Tonal rocks, probably pretty rare. Singing rocks.@@@音调性岩石声，可能相当罕见。会唱歌的岩石声。
Snow_Misc@@雪_其它@@@Snow sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的雪声。

Snow_Crash & Debris@@雪_碎片@@@Snow big crashes, a big fall of snow, a roof full of snow collapsing. See also NATURAL DISASTER-AVALANCE for the extreme version of this.@@@大雪崩塌，大量雪块坠落，屋顶积雪坍塌。极端版本见 Natural Disaster-Avalanche。
Snow_Friction@@雪_挤压@@@Snow scrapes, squeaks. Skiing on snow, sledding.@@@雪地刮擦声、吱吱声。雪上滑雪、雪橇滑行。
Snow_Handle@@雪_抓取@@@Snow being handled, a snowball being formed, etc. Digging out of show with your hands. Some overlap with SNOW-MOVEMENT.@@@处理雪，形成雪球等。用手从雪中挖掘。与 Snow-Movement 类别有部分重叠。
Snow_Impact@@雪_打击@@@A big impact of snow, like a roof full of snow falling. Or smaller like a snowball. Jumping into a pile of snow.@@@雪的强烈冲击声，例如屋顶积雪滑落。或较小的声音，如雪球。跳入雪堆的声音。
Snow_Movement@@雪_移动@@@Dragging something through snow, rolling in snow. See also SNOW-HANDLE.@@@在雪中拖拽物体，在雪中滚动的声音。另见 Snow-Handle 类别。
Water_Misc@@水_其它@@@Water sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@本列表中其他类别未涵盖的水声。
Water_Bubbles@@水_气泡@@@Single or continuous bubbles. Water boiling on a stove, fish tank bubbles.@@@单个或连续的气泡声。炉子上水沸腾声、鱼缸气泡声。
Drain@@排水@@@Draining gurgling water, pulling in air with it as it drains, think a kitchen sink drain, or a storm drain, shower drain.@@@排水时的汩汩声，伴随着空气被吸入，比如厨房水槽排水、雨水渠排水或淋浴排水的声音。
Drip@@滴@@@Water dripping, slow to fast. A cave drip, a leaking pipe dripping or a kitchen faucet dripping.@@@水滴声，从慢到快。例如洞穴滴水、管道漏水或厨房水龙头滴水的声音。
Fizz@@水_气泡@@@That sound of Alka-Seltzer in a cup, air fizzing in water. Carbonated beverages.@@@泡腾片在水杯中的声音，水中气泡嘶嘶作响。类似碳酸饮料的声音。

Flow@@水流@@@General water flowing, in our case as in a river, creek or stream. Steady water. Rapids would fall under WATER-TURBULENCE, and WATERFALL has its own subcategory@@@一般的水流声，比如河流、小溪或溪流中的稳定水流。急流属于“Water-Turbulence”类别，而瀑布则有其独立的子类别。
Fountain@@喷泉@@@Water features and fountains, trickles or flows for a fountain, splashy fountains. From tiny to large city fountains.@@@水景和喷泉的声音，喷泉的细流或水流声，以及水花飞溅的喷泉声。从小型到大型城市喷泉。
Water_Impact@@水_击打@@@Percussive water impact, large crash or slam of water, as in huge wave hitting an object. Bigger and sharper than a SPLASH@@@冲击性的水声，巨大的水撞击或拍打声，比如巨浪拍打物体。比“Splash”更大、更尖锐。

Lap@@拍浪@@@Water splashing against something like against the side of a boat or canoe, or a dock. Also meant for very small waves lapping on shore, like gentle very small waves at night.@@@水拍打物体的声音，比如拍打船、独木舟或码头的侧面。也适用于非常小的波浪轻拍海岸的声音，比如夜间轻柔的细浪。

Water_Movement@@水_移动@@@Movement in water but not underwater (see WATER-UNDERWATER) Drags through water, swimming movements, sweeps of objects through water. Thrashing in water.@@@水中的运动声，但非水下（参见“Water-Underwater”）。例如在水中拖曳、游泳动作、物体扫过水面、在水中扑腾的声音。
Plumbing@@水管道@@@Household plumbing, like a sink running, a toilet flush, the shower running. DRAIN has its own subcategory.@@@家用管道的声音，比如水槽流水、马桶冲水、淋浴流水。“Drain”有其独立的子类别。
Water_Pour@@倒水@@@Pouring water, onto ground, into a cup. Overlap with FOOD & DRINK-POUR.@@@倒水的声音，倒在地上或杯子里。与“Food & Drink-Pour”类别有重叠。
Splash@@泼洒飞溅@@@Water splashes of all kind, a person diving into a pool, a whale cresting, throwing a rock into water.@@@各种水花飞溅声，比如人跳入泳池、鲸鱼跃出水面、向水中扔石头的声音。
Spray@@水花@@@Big sprays of a wave crash, to a hose spray.@@@从巨浪撞击的大片水花声，到水管喷水的声音。
Water_Steam@@蒸汽@@@Very wet hisses, radiators, saunas. Hot wet steam.@@@非常潮湿的嘶嘶声，比如散热器、桑拿房的声音。湿热蒸汽的声音。
Surf@@浪花拍岸@@@The general roar of the ocean, not the sport. Constant ocean roaring waves.@@@海洋的一般轰鸣声（非体育项目）。持续不断的海洋波涛轰鸣声。
Water_Turbulent@@水_汹涌澎湃@@@Very big splashy water. Whirlpools, big rapids on a river. Dangerous water.@@@非常巨大且水花四溅的水声。比如漩涡、河流上的大急流。危险水域的声音。

Water_Underwater@@水_水下@@@Specifically underwater sounds, flows, current and movement, Swimming underwater. See also AMBIENCE-UNDERWATER and WATER-MOVEMENT as well.@@@特指水下声音、水流、洋流与运动，水下游泳。另请参见 Ambience-Underwater 和 Water-Movement。
Waterfall@@瀑布@@@Waterfalls from small cascading ones to Niagara falls.@@@瀑布，从小型层叠瀑布到尼亚加拉大瀑布。

Wave@@波浪@@@For general water waves, distinct waves. General ocean roar to go in WATER-SURF, and tiny waves to WATER-LAPPING. See also NATURAL DISASTERS-TSUNAMI.@@@泛指水浪，明显的波浪。一般的海洋咆哮声归入 Water-Surf，微小波浪声归入 Water-Lapping。另请参见 Natural Disasters-Tsunami。
Weather_Misc@@天气_其它@@@Weather sounds not fitting another category in this list. See also NATURAL DISASTER category.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的天气声音。另请参见 Natural Disaster 类别。
Hail@@冰雹@@@Hail on various surfaces.@@@冰雹落在各种表面的声音。

Storm@@风暴@@@Composite storms, wind, rain, thunder, where elements aren't isolated. Mixed storm composite recordings. Also see WIND-TURBULENT for wind only elements and NATURAL-DISASTER.@@@复合风暴，风、雨、雷声混合，元素未分离。混合风暴的复合录音。另请参见仅含风元素的 Wind-Turbulent 和 Natural-Disaster。

Thunder@@雷@@@Thunder and lightning, dry, wet, distant rumbles to sharp thunder cracks. Combination RAIN & THUNDER may best go into WEATHER-STORM@@@雷声与闪电，干燥的、潮湿的，从遥远的隆隆声到尖锐的霹雳声。雨雷混合声最好归入 Weather-Storm。
Wind_Designed@@风_声音设计@@@Designed or manufactured or artificial winds, wind machines, synth winds.@@@设计、制造或人工的风声、风机器、合成风声。
Wind_General@@风_通用@@@Base and general wind category.@@@基础及通用风声类别。

Gust@@阵风@@@For more singular gusts or buffets, accents to cut into other winds. Usually shorter. A constant buffeting wind better off in the GENERAL or TURBULENT category.@@@用于更单一的阵风或冲击声，作为切入其他风声的重音。通常较短。持续冲击的风声更适合归入通用或湍流类别。

Wind_Interior@@室内@@@Interior wind, through window, or crack in door. Wind through chimney or vent pipe, but see also WIND-TONAL for overtly tonal winds and whistles.@@@室内风声，穿过窗户或门缝的风声。穿过烟囱或通风管的风声，但明显带有音调的风声和哨声另见音调风声。
Wind_Tonal@@风_音乐性@@@Wind howls, wind in wires, wind whistles, overtly tonal winds.@@@风的呼啸声、风穿过电线的声音、风哨声、明显带有音调的风声。
Wind_Turbulent@@风_汹涌澎湃@@@Extremely violent wind, big buffeting, huge storm winds. Possible overlap with NATURAL DISASTER-TORNADO or WEATHER-STORM.@@@极其猛烈的风、巨大的冲击风、特大风暴风声。可能与自然灾害-龙卷风或天气-风暴类别有重叠。
Wind_Vegetation@@风_植物@@@Wind through foliage, vegetation, grass, trees, leaves, plants.@@@风穿过树叶、植被、草地、树木、叶子、植物的声音。
Ambience_Misc@@环境_其它@@@Ambience sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合本列表中其他类别的环境音。

Air@@空气@@@Quiet exterior 'air' with little activity, like exterior room tones, very simple exterior ambiences. The exterior equivalent of a room tone. If noticable activity find a better fitting category.@@@安静的外部“空气”声，活动稀少，类似外部房间底噪，非常简单的室外环境声。相当于室外的房间底噪。若有明显活动，请寻找更合适的类别。
Alpine@@高山@@@Mountain ambiences, for recordings and ambiences geographically linked to Alpine Environments. Some overlap with AMBIENCE-RURAL.@@@山区环境声，用于与阿尔卑斯环境地理相关的录音和环境声。与 Ambience-Rural 类别有部分重叠。

Ambience_Amusement@@娱乐@@@Theme parks and carnivals. Beware of possible rights issues with uncleared music. Carnivals, fairs, festivals. Probably arcades too.@@@主题公园和嘉年华。注意未授权音乐可能存在的版权问题。嘉年华、集市、节庆活动。可能也包括街机厅。

Birdsong@@鸟鸣@@@Group songbirds, like a dawn chorus of pretty birds, where the birds are the prominent sound. Single birds would go in BIRDS-SONGBIRD.@@@群鸟鸣唱，如悦耳鸟类的黎明合唱，其中鸟鸣是主要声音。单只鸟鸣应归入 Birds-Songbird 类别。

Ambience_Celebration@@庆典@@@Parties, New Years Eve. Not pure crowds, as that would go in CROWDS, but i.e. exterior city new years. Also see AMBIENCES-AMUSEMENT for something like a fair or festival.@@@派对、除夕夜。非纯粹人群声（那应归入 Crowds），例如城市室外除夕场景。另请参见 Ambiences-Amusement 类别，适用于集市或节庆等场景。
Ambience_Construction@@环境_施工@@@Construction scenes with things like jackhammers, cranes, pile drivers, composite construction scene, road construction also.@@@施工场景，包含破碎锤、起重机、打桩机等声音，复合施工场景，也包括道路施工。
Desert@@沙漠@@@Quiet desert ambiences with appropriate insects and birds. Maybe tumbleweeds.@@@安静的沙漠环境声，伴有相应的昆虫和鸟类声。可能还有风滚草的声音。

Ambience_Designed@@设计@@@Artificial designed ambience. V8.2 adds AMBIENCE-FANTASY and AMBIENCE-SCIFI which may be better fit for most 'designed' categories.@@@人工设计的环境声。V8.2版本新增了 Ambience-Fantasy 和 Ambience-Scifi 类别，可能更适合大多数“设计”类声音。

Ambience_Emergency@@紧急@@@Crime scenes, firefighting scenes, accident scenes, with things like firefighters, police, ambulances and medics. Also see VEHICLES-EMERGENCY.@@@犯罪现场、消防现场、事故现场，包含消防员、警察、救护车和医护人员等声音。另请参见 Vehicles-Emergency 类别。
Fantasy@@奇幻@@@Magical or other wordly composite ambiences, soundscapes, think Middle Earth or Pandora.@@@魔法或其他超凡世界的复合环境声、音景，例如中土世界或潘多拉星球。

Ambience_Farm@@环境_农场@@@Specifically farm ambiences, with animals, maybe tractors working, chickens, etc. Isolated farm animals would go into ANIMALS-FARM.@@@特指农场环境声，包含动物声，可能有拖拉机作业、鸡叫等。单独的农场动物声应归入 Animals-Farm 类别。

Forest@@森林@@@Forest recordings or forest composite files. Trees and birds, maybe wind in trees all together. Some overlap with AMBIENCE-RURAL or AMBIENCE-ALPINE.@@@森林录音或森林复合文件。包含树木和鸟鸣，可能还有风吹树林的整体声音。与 Ambience-Rural 或 Ambience-Alpine 类别有部分重叠。
Grassland@@草地@@@Prairies, meadows, grazing patures, etc. But FARMS has own category if farm animals or human activity are present.@@@草原、草地、牧场等。但如果存在农场动物或人类活动，则农场有专属的 Farms 类别。
Ambience_Historical@@历史年代@@@Old West scenes, Roman street scenes. Composite history and ancient ambiences.@@@老西部场景，罗马街景。复合的历史与古代氛围。
Ambience_Hitech@@环境_高科技@@@Hi-tech machine rooms. Data centers, control rooms. James Bond type lairs. Spaceship interiors.@@@高科技机房。数据中心，控制室。詹姆斯·邦德式的巢穴。宇宙飞船内部。
Hospital@@医院@@@Hospital ambiences of all kinds, surgery and emergency rooms too. Possibly veterinarian hospitals too.@@@各类医院环境，手术室和急诊室也包括在内。可能还有兽医医院。
Ambience_Industrial@@环境_工业@@@Industrial warehouses and factories, plants or any ambience with an industrial feeling.@@@工业仓库和工厂，厂房或任何具有工业感的环境。

Ambience_Insect@@环境_昆虫@@@Thick ambiences of insects, cicada and cricket beds mainly. May contain over sounds but main sound being large presence of insects. See also ANIMALS-INSECT for more isolated sounds.@@@浓厚的昆虫环境音，主要是蝉和蟋蟀群。可能包含其他声音，但主要声音是大量昆虫的存在。更多独立声音请参见 Animals-Insect。

Lakeside@@湖岸@@@Ambiences relating to lakes, not isolated lapping, but the lake version of AMBIENCE-SEASIDE. See also WATER-LAPPING.@@@与湖泊相关的环境音，不是孤立的水波声，而是类似 Ambience-Seaside 的湖泊版本。另请参见 Water-Lapping。
Market@@市场@@@Busy exterior or interior market activity and crowds. Think vibrant international markets in Istanbul or Africa, but any market.@@@繁忙的室外或室内市场活动与人潮。想象伊斯坦布尔或非洲充满活力的国际市场，但任何市场都可以。

Nautical@@航海@@@Relating to ships at sea, shipyards, things revolving around ships. (compare to AMBIENCE-SEASIDE). Water only recordings would go to a WATER category.@@@与海上船只、造船厂、围绕船只的事物相关。（可与 Ambience-Seaside 比较）。纯水声录音应归入 Water 类别。
Ambience_Office@@办公室@@@Workplaces, offices, people working, typing, telephones. General offices of various sizes.@@@工作场所，办公室，人们工作、打字、打电话的声音。各种规模的一般办公室。
Park@@公园@@@Parks, mostly city or suburban, probably usually with some human activity, city activity. Not pure nature sounds.@@@公园，主要是城市或郊区的，通常可能有一些人类活动、城市活动。不是纯粹的自然声音。
Ambience_Prison@@监狱@@@Prisons and jails, reverberant inmate walla, jail doors, buzzers, that sort of thing.@@@监狱和拘留所，混响的囚犯人声、牢房门、蜂鸣器之类的声音。
Protest@@游行@@@Protests, Rallies, Riots. Big mixed ambiences of crowds, shouting, yelling, chanting. Opposed to AMBIENCE-CHEERING.@@@抗议、集会、骚乱。人群混杂的巨大环境音，包括呼喊、叫嚷、口号声。与 Ambience-Cheering 相对。

Public Place@@公共场所@@@Except for restaurants, for any other usually indoor public places such as stores, lobbies, hotels, malls, museums. Lots of possible overlap with other categories. Use if not fitting elsewhere.@@@除餐厅外，适用于其他通常为室内的公共场所，如商店、大堂、酒店、商场、博物馆。可能与其他类别有大量重叠。如果不适合其他地方，请使用此类别。
Religious@@宗教场所@@@Church and temples, church services, religious gatherings, pilgrimages. Any ambience relating to religion.@@@教堂和寺庙，教堂礼拜，宗教集会，朝圣。任何与宗教相关的环境音。

Residential@@住宅区@@@Something busier than a room tone, an Apartment, a House with some activity from outside etc. Interior with exterior sounds coming through closed or open doors, windows.@@@比房间底噪更繁忙一些的声音，如公寓、有外部活动的房屋等。室内能听到通过关闭或打开的门窗传来的外部声音。
Restaurant & Bar@@餐馆@@@Restaurants and bars, pubs, places of eating and drinking, mixed crowd with glass clinks or silverware.@@@餐厅、酒吧、酒馆、餐饮场所，混杂人群与玻璃杯碰撞或银器声响。

Room Tone@@房间底噪@@@Simple room tones with little or no activity. Also see now AMBIENCE-RESIDENTIAL if more than just air is present, as it might be a better fit.@@@简单的房间环境音，几乎没有活动。如果不止有空气流动声，也请参考 Ambience-Residential，可能更合适。

Rural@@农村@@@Rural and countryside ambiences that don't fit somewhere else in this list. Nature, away from signs of people, overlap with AMBIENCE-ALPINE, DESERT, FOREST, PRAIRIE, etc.@@@不适合列表中其他类别的乡村与田园环境音。远离人迹的自然之声，与 Ambience-Alpine、Desert、Forest、Prairie 等类别有重叠。
School@@校园@@@Schools of any age, kindergarten through college, hallways, lockers, voices, school bells.@@@任何年龄段的学校，从幼儿园到大学，走廊、储物柜、人声、上课铃声。

Scifi@@科幻@@@A composite sci-fi ambience, a complex background layered with many sci-fi elements. A complex spacehip bridge, or high-tech lab. See also SCIFI for individual elements.@@@复合科幻环境音，由多种科幻元素叠加而成的复杂背景。复杂的飞船舰桥或高科技实验室。单个元素也请参见 Scifi 类别。

Seaside@@海边@@@Relating to beach and oceanside scenes with people. (Compare to AMBIENCE-NAUTICAL). Water only recordings would go to a WATER category.@@@与有人的海滩和海滨场景相关。（可与 Ambience-Nautical 比较）。纯水声录音应归入 Water 类别。
Ambience_Sport@@运动场@@@Sporting events, little league baseball to major league. Use CROWDS-SPORT for clean crowd recordings.@@@体育赛事，从小联盟棒球到职业联赛。干净的观众录音请使用 Crowds-Sport 类别。
Suburban@@郊区@@@Suburban streets, average residential neighborhood, not dense like URBAN. Lawnmowers, sprinklers, birds.@@@郊区街道，普通住宅区，不像 Urban 那样密集。割草机、洒水器、鸟鸣声。

Swamp@@沼泽地@@@A wetland often partially or intermittently covered with water; especially : one dominated by woody vegetation. Marshes, although tecnically different, are included here. Any wetland.@@@通常部分或间歇性被水覆盖的湿地；尤指以木本植被为主的湿地。沼泽，尽管技术上不同，也包含在此。泛指任何湿地。

Town@@小镇@@@Something in between a CITY and a SUBURB. Activity, cars, pedestrians, that 'small town' or village sound. May be confusion between this, AMBIENCE-URBAN and AMBIENCE-SUBURBAN.@@@介于 City 和 Suburb 之间的环境。活动、车辆、行人，那种“小镇”或村庄的声音。可能与 Ambience-Urban 和 Ambience-Suburban 类别混淆。

Traffic@@交通@@@Specifically traffic without people. Not for a single car by, but for clean busy traffic, clean highway traffic for example. Rush hour where the sound is predominantly cars.@@@特指无人的交通声。不适用于单辆车驶过，而是指纯粹的繁忙交通声，例如干净的高速公路车流。以汽车声为主的交通高峰时段。

Transportation@@交通工具@@@Not VEHICLES, but public train stations, airports, bus stations, subway stations. Not the airplane or train itself. But public places centering around transportation.@@@不是 Vehicles，而是公共火车站、机场、公交车站、地铁站。不是飞机或火车本身。而是以交通为中心的公共场所。
Ambience_Tropical@@环境_热带@@@Jungles and rainforests, lush animal life and vegetation.@@@丛林和雨林，丰富的动植物生命与茂密植被。
Tundra@@冻土@@@Treeless environments where the ground is permanently frozen, arctic, antarctic.@@@无树环境，地面永久冻结，北极、南极地区。
Underground@@地下@@@Subterranean, underground ambiences like sewers, bunkers, tunnels, dungeons, caves.@@@地下、地下的环境音，如下水道、掩体、隧道、地牢、洞穴。
Ambience_Underwater@@环境_水下@@@Underwater sounding ambiences, deep bubbles and that classic undersea world sound. See also WATER-UNDERWATER.@@@水下环境音，深水气泡和经典的海底世界声音。另见 Water-Underwater。

Urban@@城市@@@Dense cities and environments. New York City or London or Mumbai. Often Dense Traffic, horns, pedestrians, buses, but really any city. Overlap with AMBIENCE-TOWN possible.@@@密集的城市和环境。如纽约、伦敦或孟买。通常包含密集的交通、喇叭声、行人、公交车声，但泛指任何城市。可能与 Ambience-Town 类别重叠。
Warfare@@战争@@@Battles, warfare, full ambiences here. Not for isolated WEAPONS or VEHICLES which have their own categories. Composite sounds of war.@@@战斗、战争，完整的战争环境音。不适用于单独的武器或载具，它们有各自的类别。这是战争的复合音效。
Adr@@ADR@@@Re-recorded lines via the ADR process.@@@通过自动对白替换流程重新录制的台词。
Asset@@资源@@@A delivered or stored asset, most likely for video game use, but something used in the development of a project.@@@已交付或存储的资源，很可能用于电子游戏，但也用于项目开发。
Bounce@@导出@@@Bounces made for picture department, layered bounces.@@@为画面部门制作的反弹声，分层反弹声。
Impulse Response@@卷积混响素材@@@Impulse Responses, reverb and otherwise.@@@脉冲响应，混响及其他。
Archived_Loop Group@@循环群组@@@Loop group crowds or lines. Specifically recorded in a loop group envirment and needing to tracked as such.@@@循环群组人群声或台词。特指在循环群组环境中录制并需要如此追踪的。
Mix@@混音@@@Premixes, final mixes, mixdowns, stems.@@@预混音、终混音、混音缩混、分轨。
Pfx@@现场音效@@@FX Stolen from production takes only. Beware of possible rights issues.@@@仅从制作素材中提取的音效。注意可能存在的版权问题。
Production@@现场对白@@@Production takes, dialog lines and other spoken line production takes.@@@制作素材，对白台词及其他口语台词制作素材。
Raw@@原始素材@@@Raw recording files, for example a load of a full DAT tape.@@@原始录音文件，例如一整盘 Dat 磁带的加载内容。
Reference@@参考素材@@@Reference material, often restricted, used for reference only. Beware of possible rights issues.@@@参考材料，通常受限，仅供参考。注意可能存在的版权问题。
Scene@@场景素材@@@Pre-built scenes and soundscapes, designed scenes. For example a fully build old-west scene.@@@预制场景和声景，设计好的场景。例如一个完整构建的西部老镇场景。
Test Tone@@测试音@@@Test tones used for calibration, ADR beeps, Pink Noise, Sine wave Sweeps.@@@用于校准的测试音、自动对白替换提示音、粉红噪声、正弦波扫频。
Trademarked@@商标音@@@For trademarked or copyright sounds that you need to store in your library. Jingles, logos.@@@用于存储到库中的商标或版权声音。广告曲、标识音。
Work In Progress@@过程中素材@@@Files that aren't fully metadata'd, or mastered, tag to remind you there is work to do. Recordings awaiting mastering.@@@元数据不完整或未进行母带处理的文件，标记以提醒你有工作要做。等待母带处理的录音。
Wtf@@未确认素材@@@Literally what it says 'What the F_ck' is THIS sound... Strange otherwise uncategorizable sounds.@@@字面意思就是“这他_妈是什么”声音……奇怪且无法归类的其他声音。
Beeps_Appliance@@提示音_电器@@@Microwave oven beeps, dishwasher beeps.@@@微波炉提示音、洗碗机提示音。
Beeps_General@@提示音_通用@@@Beep sounds not fitting another category in this list. User Interface beeps go to UI-BEEPS.@@@不适合列表中其他类别的提示音。用户界面提示音归入 Ui-Beeps。
Lofi@@低保真@@@Very low fidelity, old 8-bit beeps.@@@保真度极低的老式8位提示音。
Beeps_Medical@@医疗器械@@@Beeps from various medical devices, EKG, Life Support.@@@各种医疗设备的提示音，心电图机、生命维持设备。
Timer@@计时器@@@Specifically timer beeps, counting down. Classic time bomb beeps.@@@特指定时器提示音，倒计时音。经典的定时炸弹提示音。
Beeps_Vehicle@@车辆@@@Backup beeps from a large truck or construction vehicle.@@@大型卡车或工程车辆倒车时的提示音。
Cartoon_Misc@@卡通_其它@@@Cartoon sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合本列表中其他类别的卡通声音。
Cartoon_Animal@@卡通_动物@@@Cartoon animals, made from animals calls, props, etc. Very silly or stylized animals calls for use in Cartoons.@@@卡通动物声，由动物叫声、道具等制作而成。用于卡通片的非常滑稽或风格化的动物叫声。
Boing@@弹簧音@@@Cartoon boings, like for a bouncing cartoon character. Roger Rabbit or Tigger from Winnie the Pooh.@@@卡通弹跳声，例如弹跳的卡通角色。如《谁陷害了兔子罗杰》中的罗杰或《小熊维尼》中的跳跳虎。
Clang@@咣当@@@Cartoon clangs, like a funny anvil hit. Most likely a very metallic resonant hit.@@@卡通哐当声，例如搞笑的铁砧敲击声。很可能是非常金属感的共鸣敲击声。
Cartoon_Creak@@卡通_嘎吱@@@Cartoon creaks, some overlap or confusion with CARTOON-STRETCH possible.@@@卡通吱嘎声，可能与 Cartoon-Stretch 类别有重叠或混淆。
Cartoon_Horn@@号@@@Cartoon horns, as in bulb horns, clown horns.@@@卡通喇叭声，例如球形喇叭、小丑喇叭的声音。
Cartoon_Impact@@卡通_打击@@@Cartoon hits, bonk, boink, doink..@@@卡通击打声，如"Bonk"、"Boink"、"Doink"等。
Cartoon_Machine@@机器@@@Cartoon machines, an overly comical sounding machine or contraption. A Rube Goldberg contraption.@@@卡通机器声，一种听起来过于滑稽的机器或装置声。如鲁布·戈德堡机械装置的声音。
Musical@@卡通_音乐性@@@Cartoon musical phrases. String plucks for a cartoon character sneaking up on another. Perhaps a cartoon musical phrase.@@@卡通音乐短句。例如卡通角色悄悄接近另一个角色时的弦乐拨奏声。可能是一段卡通音乐短句。
Pluck@@弹拨@@@Cartoon string plucks, violin plucks, dental floss plucks.@@@卡通弦乐拨奏声，小提琴拨奏声，牙线拨动声。
Pop@@卡通_道具@@@Cartoon funny pops, mouth pops, suction cup pops.@@@卡通滑稽的爆裂声，嘴部爆裂声，吸盘爆裂声。
Shake@@摇晃@@@Cartoon shake, like a noisemaker toy, maraca.@@@卡通摇动声，如摇响玩具、沙锤的声音。
Cartoon_Splat@@啪嗒@@@Cartoon splats, funny liquid and mud like splats and things.@@@卡通溅泼声，滑稽的液体和泥浆类溅泼声等。
Squeak@@卡通_摩擦@@@Cartoon squeaks. funny little sounding squeaks of things.@@@卡通吱吱声。事物发出的滑稽细小吱吱声。
Stretch@@伸缩@@@Cartoon stretches, funny rubber or other type stretching sounds, exaggerated.@@@卡通拉伸声，滑稽的橡胶或其他材质的拉伸声，夸张化处理。
Cartoon_Swish@@嗖嗖@@@Cartoon swishes, specifically very funny cartoony swishes.@@@卡通嗖嗖声，特指非常滑稽的卡通式嗖嗖声。
Twang@@弹拨声@@@Cartoon twangs, that classic ruler twang type sound.@@@卡通拨弦声，那种经典的尺子拨动类型的声音。
Cartoon_Vehicle@@卡通_载具@@@Cartoon vehicles, think Jetsons spaceship or Flintstones cars.@@@卡通交通工具声，想想《杰森一家》的太空船或《摩登原始人》的汽车声。
Cartoon_Vocal@@卡通_语音@@@Cartoon vocals, specifically very silly. See also CARTOON-ANIMALS for non-human vocals.@@@卡通人声，特指非常滑稽的人声。非人声的动物叫声另请参见 Cartoon-Animals。
Warble@@颤音@@@Cartoon warble.@@@卡通颤音。
Whistle@@哨子@@@Cartoon whistles, most likely slide whistles, other very silly whistles. A Wolf-Whistle.@@@卡通式口哨声，很可能是滑哨，以及其他非常滑稽的口哨声。一声挑逗的口哨。
Zip@@卡通_拉链@@@Cartoon zips. Very fast 'zip' type sounds, often for fast movement aways.@@@卡通式咻声。非常快速的“咻”类声音，常用于快速远离的动作。
Designed_Misc@@声音设计_其它@@@Designed sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@设计的音效，不适用于此列表中的其他类别。
Bass Dive@@低频下潜@@@Deep descending bass notes. Bass Drops.@@@深沉下行的低音音符。低音坠落。
Boom@@低频轰鸣@@@Deep short and tight, low end stingers, big trailer deep hits. LFE type low end sweeteners.@@@深沉、短促、紧凑的低频冲击音，大型预告片式的深沉撞击。Lfe 类型的低频甜化音效。
Braam@@低频号角@@@Long deep horn like sounds. Like a War of the World's type long sound, or like a long french horn braam type sound.@@@悠长、深沉、类似号角的声音。像是《世界大战》风格的长音，或者像悠长的法国号"布拉姆"式声音。
Distortion@@失真@@@Particulary distored designed sounds and distortion elements.@@@特别设计的失真音效和失真元素。
Drone@@低音氛围@@@Designed drones, eerie tense drones, long stylized sounds with not much activity or movement.@@@设计的嗡鸣声，诡异紧张的嗡鸣，长而风格化、活动或变化不多的声音。
Eerie@@毛骨悚然@@@Often designed, but tense strange undefined sounds that are eerie, tense, suspenseful. Some overlap with DESIGNED-DRONE possible.@@@通常是设计的，但紧张、奇怪、难以定义的声音，诡异、紧张、悬疑。可能与"设计的嗡鸣"类别有重叠。
Designed_Ethereal@@鬼魅飘渺@@@Ethereal wispy designed sounds. Ghostlike whispers, or heavenly tones. Otherworldly. See also DESIGNED-EERIE.@@@空灵、飘渺的设计音效。幽灵般的低语，或天籁般的音调。超凡脱俗。另见"设计的诡异"。

Granular@@粒状@@@Granular synthesis, sounds that have a gritty textural type sound, think PaulStretch, sounds broken down into tiny slices and recompiled.@@@颗粒合成，具有颗粒感纹理的声音，想象一下 Paulstretch，声音被分解成微小片段并重新编译。
Designed_Impact@@声音设计_碰撞@@@Designed huge impacts, collisions, stylized big hits. Possible overlap with DESIGNED-STINGER.@@@设计的巨大冲击、碰撞，风格化的大型撞击。可能与"设计的冲击音"有重叠。
Morph@@声音设计_合成器@@@A stylized blending of elements, something transitioning into another thing.@@@元素的风格化融合，某物过渡成另一物。
Riser@@渐强@@@Tension risers, things rising in tone, something similar to a rising string line to create tension.@@@紧张感提升音，音调上升的事物，类似于上升的弦乐线条以制造紧张感。
Rumble@@次声波@@@Designed rumbles for layering into a mix. Earthquake rumbles. Composite rumble.@@@设计的隆隆声，用于混音叠加。地震般的隆隆声。复合隆隆声。
Rhythmic@@节奏性@@@Stattaco or glitchy machine type loops, things with definied starts, stops, rhythmic stutters.@@@断奏或故障机器类型的循环，具有明确开始、停止、节奏性卡顿的事物。
Designed_Source@@声音设计_原始录音@@@For recordings meant to be used as source for other designed sounds, experimental recordings, elements, etc.@@@用于作为其他设计音效源材料的录音，实验性录音、元素等。

Designed_Stinger@@重音强调@@@Stings, stylized screen sweeteners. Big trailer type sounds. Big shock scare type sounds. Stylized stings, hits and impacts. Overlap with DESIGNED-IMPACT.@@@刺激音效，风格化的屏幕甜味剂。大型预告片式音效。强烈惊吓式音效。风格化的刺激音、撞击声和冲击声。与"设计冲击"类别有重叠。
Synthetic@@电子合成@@@Very synthesized sounds, very electronic synth stuff. Raw work files of synth-play.@@@高度合成的声音，非常电子化的合成器素材。合成器演奏的原始工作文件。
Designed_Tonal@@声音设计_音乐性@@@Designed sounds with a particularly tonal nature. The ringing in your ear of tinnitus for example.@@@具有特定音调特性的设计音效。例如耳鸣时耳朵里的嗡嗡声。
Designed_Vocal@@人声@@@Design specifically around vocals, ghostly whispers, enchanted spells, reversed talking etc. Not for Creatures.@@@专门围绕人声设计，如幽灵般的低语、附魔咒语、倒放讲话等。不适用于生物音效。

Designed_Whoosh@@呼声@@@Stylized designed big whooshes, definite possible overlap confusion with SHOOSHES-WHOOSH, but this for less natural and more stylized versions.@@@风格化设计的大型嗖嗖声，可能与"嗖嗖声"类别存在明确的重叠混淆，但本类别适用于更不自然、更风格化的版本。

Foley_Misc@@拟音_其它@@@Used for 'performed' official and very clean Foley done to picture. For your own wild recordings use FOOTSTEPS and OBJECT categories.@@@用于“表演式”的官方且非常干净的拟音，与画面同步。您自己的自由录制请使用 Footsteps 和 Object 类别。

Foley_Cloth@@布料/衣服@@@Used for 'performed' official and very clean Foley done to picture. For your own wild recordings use FOOTSTEPS and OBJECT categories.@@@用于“表演式”的官方且非常干净的拟音，与画面同步。您自己的自由录制请使用 Footsteps 和 Object 类别。

Feet@@脚步@@@Used for 'performed' official and very clean Foley done to picture. For your own wild recordings use FOOTSTEPS and OBJECT categories.@@@用于“表演式”的官方且非常干净的拟音，与画面同步。您自己的自由录制请使用 Footsteps 和 Object 类别。

Hands@@手@@@Used for 'performed' official and very clean Foley done to picture. For your own wild recordings use FOOTSTEPS and OBJECT categories.@@@用于“表演式”的官方且非常干净的拟音，与画面同步。您自己的自由录制请使用 Footsteps 和 Object 类别。

Foley_Prop@@拟音_道具@@@Used for 'performed' official and very clean Foley done to picture. For your own wild recordings use FOOTSTEPS and OBJECT categories.@@@用于“表演式”的官方且非常干净的拟音，与画面同步。您自己的自由录制请使用 Footsteps 和 Object 类别。
Magic_Misc@@魔法_其它@@@Magic sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的魔法声音。
Angelic@@天使@@@Angelic, Holy, Benevolent magic. The opposite of evil. Think choral tones and healing magic.@@@天使般的、神圣的、仁慈的魔法。与邪恶相对。想象合唱音调和治疗魔法。
Magic_Elemental@@元素@@@Magic centered around elements, fire, water, ice. Think the movie Frozen type stuff.@@@围绕元素的魔法，火、水、冰。想想《冰雪奇缘》那种类型的东西。
Evil@@邪恶@@@Evil magic, ominous, dark magic. Voldemort type stuff.@@@邪恶魔法，不祥的、黑暗魔法。伏地魔那种类型的东西。
Poof@@嘭@@@Shorter magic phrases, often for transforming, short 'turn you into a rabbit' type stuff.@@@较短的魔法咒语，通常用于变形，比如“把你变成兔子”那种短咒语。
Shimmer@@闪耀@@@Glassy or chime-like shimmers, waves of particle type magic.@@@玻璃般或钟鸣般的闪烁，粒子型魔法的波动。
Spell@@咒语@@@Something complex for a spell being cast. Think Maleficent swirling green magic or weird vocal-ish spells.@@@施法时产生的复杂效果。想象一下玛琳菲森旋转的绿色魔法或怪异的、类似人声的咒语。
Musical_Misc@@乐句_其它@@@Music sounds not fitting another category in this list. Hopefully rarely needed.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的音乐声音。希望很少用到。

Bells@@钟铃@@@Specifically musical bells, tuned bells, think Tubular bells or hand bells. See also the BELL category for non-musical uses. BELL-GONG is older and this is a better fit.@@@特指音乐钟、定音钟，例如管钟或手摇铃。非音乐用途请参见 Bell 类别。Bell-Gong 类别更古老，此类别更合适。
Brass@@铜管@@@Brass musical instruments, trumpets, tuba, french horn.@@@铜管乐器，如小号、大号、圆号。
Musical_Chime@@排铃@@@Wind chimes, bell trees, Tinkerbell type magic chimes.@@@风铃、钟树、小叮当式的魔法铃声。
Choral@@合唱@@@Choir pieces, choral, not for 'designed type vocally stuff'.@@@合唱曲目，合唱团作品，不适用于'设计类人声素材'。
Experimental@@实验@@@Strange or wierdly modified instruments, exotic instruments, prepared instruments like a prepared piano.@@@奇特或经过怪异改造的乐器、异域乐器、预制乐器（如预制钢琴）。
Instrument@@器乐@@@Various instruments that don't have a home in the other MUSICAL categories.@@@各种在其他 Musical 类别中没有归属的乐器。
Keyed@@键控@@@Keyed Instruments, such as pianos and harpsichord. For synthesizer though see MUSICAL-SYNTHESIZED.@@@键盘乐器，如钢琴和大键琴。合成器请参见 Musical-Synthesized 类别。
Loop@@循环@@@For looping musical phrases, sampled loops.@@@用于循环乐句、采样循环。

Percussion@@乐句_打击@@@Drums and percussion, including deep timpani or big war drums. Mainly meant for true membrane instruments, also see MUSICAL-TUNED PERCUSSION@@@鼓和打击乐器，包括低沉定音鼓或大战鼓。主要指真正的膜鸣乐器，另见 Musical-Tuned Percussion 类别。
Percussion Tuned@@打击乐@@@Tuned percussion mostly played with mallets, Xylophones, Vibraphones, etc.@@@主要用槌演奏的定音打击乐器，如木琴、颤音琴等。

Performance@@表演@@@A musical performance, or warm-up, a live musical act, a street musican, high school band. If a mixed ambience, look to AMBIENCE categories, like PUBLIC PLACE.@@@音乐表演或热身、现场音乐表演、街头艺人、高中乐队。如果是混合环境音，请查看 Ambience 类别，如 Public Place。
Plucked@@拨弦乐@@@Guitars, Banjos, Harps, instruments that are mainly plucked when played. See also MUSICAL-STRINGED.@@@吉他、班卓琴、竖琴等主要靠拨奏的乐器。另见 Musical-Stringed 类别。
Sample@@采样@@@Musical samples. Single triggered samples, not loops, which has its own subcategory here.@@@音乐采样。单次触发的采样，不是循环，循环在此处有单独的子类别。
Shaken@@摇动@@@Shaken musical instruments, rattles, tamourines.@@@摇奏乐器，如摇铃、铃鼓。

Song & Phrase@@乐句@@@Complete musical pieces, songs as ringtones, car music bys. See also MUSICAL-PERFORMANCE which is a better fit for 'live performances'.@@@完整的音乐作品、歌曲作为铃声、车载音乐等。另见 Musical-Performance 类别，该类别更适合'现场表演'。
Musical_Stinger@@重击音@@@A short musical phrase or accent, like a horror 'string' sting. A big pitching cello note. But musical in nature.@@@短小的音乐乐句或重音，如同恐怖片中的“弦乐”惊悚音效。一个低沉的大提琴音符。但本质上是音乐性的。
Stringed@@弦乐@@@Bowed string instruments like violin, cello, viola. Harp probably now goes to MUSICAL-PLUCKED.@@@弓弦乐器，如小提琴、大提琴、中提琴。竖琴现在可能归入 Musical-Plucked 类别。

Synthesized@@乐句_合成器@@@Synth samples, musical synth performances. Some overlap with MUSICAL-SAMPLE, but this meant for more than simple triggered samples.@@@合成器采样，音乐性的合成器演奏。与 Musical-Sample 类别有部分重叠，但此类别适用于超出简单触发采样的内容。
Toy@@玩具@@@Toys that play musical phrases, also music boxes would go here.@@@能播放音乐乐句的玩具，音乐盒也归入此类。
Woodwind@@木管@@@Woodwind instruments like flute, oboe, bassoon, clarinet.@@@木管乐器，如长笛、双簧管、巴松管、单簧管。
Scifi_Misc@@科幻_其它@@@SCI-FI sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的科幻声音。
Scifi_Alarm@@科幻_警报@@@Overly futuristic alarms, the kind you're hear on a spaceship@@@过于未来派的警报声，你在宇宙飞船上会听到的那种。

Computer@@电脑@@@Use Sci-Fi for overtly 'science fiction' type computer sounds, a very futuristic computer. Some overlap with USER INTERFACE.@@@使用 Sci-Fi 表示明显属于'科幻'类型的电脑声音，一种非常未来派的电脑声。与 User Interface 有部分重叠。
Scifi_Door@@科幻_门@@@That Star-Trek type door. Spaceship doors.@@@那种《星际迷航》式的门。宇宙飞船的门。
Energy@@能量@@@Energy particles, vortexes, transporters, holograms, force fields.@@@能量粒子、漩涡、传送器、全息影像、力场。
Scifi_Impact@@科幻_打击@@@A bolt of SciFi energy, a hi-tech energy impact, more futuristic than just an explosion. Overlap with DESIGNED-IMPACT.@@@一道科幻能量束，高科技能量冲击，比单纯的爆炸更未来派。与 Designed-Impact 重叠。
Scifi_Machine@@科幻_机械@@@Future technology machines, transporters, food replicators.@@@未来科技机器、传送器、食物复制器。

Scifi_Mechanism@@科幻_机械设备@@@An overly sci-fi sounding gizmo or mechanism. Little unfolding robot or something like that. Similar to MACHINE-MECHANISM but more SciFi.@@@听起来过于科幻的小装置或机械结构。小型展开的机器人或类似的东西。与 Machine-Mechanism 类似但更具科幻感。
Retro@@复古@@@Cheesy sci-fi sounds, like from The Jetsons, The Day the Earth Stood Still. Old TV or film sci-fi sounds.@@@俗气的科幻声音，比如来自《杰森一家》、《地球停转之日》。老式电视或电影中的科幻声音。
Spaceship@@太空船@@@Spaceships here, your best Enterprise and Tie Fighter rip-offs! See also SCIFI-VEHICLE for non-spaceships.@@@宇宙飞船在这里，你最好的企业号和钛战机模仿品！非宇宙飞船见 Scifi-Vehicle。
Scifi_Vehicle@@科幻_载具@@@Various sci-fi vehicles, like a moon rover, landspeeder, speeder bike, hoverboard, podracer. See also SCIFI-SPACESHIP.@@@各种科幻载具，如月球车、陆地飞车、飞行摩托、悬浮滑板、飞梭赛车。另见 Scifi-Spaceship。
Weapon@@科幻_武器@@@Lightsabers, exotic sci-fi weapons. Not a 'blaster' which would go in LASERS-GUN.@@@光剑，奇异的科幻武器。不是'爆能枪'，后者属于 Lasers-Gun。
Swooshes_Swish@@嗖嗖声@@@A swish is smaller than a Whoosh. Arm Swishes, Sword Swishes. Small objects make Swishes.@@@Swish 声比 Whoosh 声小。手臂挥动声、剑挥动声。小物体会产生 Swish 声。

Swooshes_Whoosh@@呼呼声_呼呼声@@@A whoosh is larger than a swish. A large object would make a Whoosh. Tanks flying over your head, or an asteroid by. See also DESIGNED-WHOOSH for very stylized whooshes.@@@Whoosh 声比 Swish 声大。大型物体会产生 Whoosh 声。例如坦克从头顶飞过，或小行星掠过。另见 Designed-Whoosh 类别，指风格化很强的 Whoosh 声。
Aircraft_Misc@@航空器_其它@@@Aircraft not fitting another category in this list.@@@本列表中其他类别无法归类的飞机声音。
Aircraft_Door@@航空器_门@@@Aircraft doors, some possible overlap with other DOOR categories, or VEHICLES-DOOR.@@@飞机舱门声，可能与“门”类或“交通工具-门”类有重叠。
Helicopter@@直升机@@@For all manner of helicopters, gyrocopters.@@@各种直升机、旋翼机的声音。
Aircraft_Interior@@航空舱@@@Interior recordings (mainly complex ambiences) of aircraft, from cockpit interiors, to passenger jet interiors.@@@飞机内部录音（主要是复杂的环境声），包括驾驶舱内部、喷气式客机内部。
Jet@@喷气式飞机@@@All commercial and private jet powered aircraft, military jets would go under AIRCRAFT-MILITARY.@@@所有商用和私人喷气式飞机。军用喷气机归入“飞机-军用”类。
Aircraft_Mechanism@@航空器_机械@@@Mechanical components of aircraft, for example landing gear, or levers and switches.@@@飞机的机械部件声，例如起落架、操纵杆和开关声。

Aircraft_Military@@航空器_军用@@@Military aircraft, military fighter jets, stealth bombers, but any military aircraft goes here. Also military drones. Military helicopters could go here or in AIRCRAFT-HELICOPTER.@@@军用飞机，包括军用战斗机、隐形轰炸机等所有军用航空器。军用无人机也归入此类。军用直升机可归入此类或“飞机-直升机”类。
Aircraft_Prop@@螺旋桨飞机@@@Aircraft using props as means of propulsion. A propeller airplane.@@@使用螺旋桨推进的飞机。螺旋桨飞机。
Radio Controlled@@塔台@@@Toy hobby radio controlled, UAV, quadcopters, RC jets and RC helicopters.@@@玩具/业余无线电遥控设备、无人机、四轴飞行器、遥控喷气机和遥控直升机。
Rocket@@火箭@@@Jet powered rockets and rocket engines., missiles.@@@喷气动力火箭和火箭发动机、导弹的声音。
Boats_Misc@@船舶_其它@@@Boat sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的船只声音。
Air Boat@@汽艇@@@Specifically large fan airboats used in swamps. Think the type of boat used in the Everglades. Also hovercraft.@@@特指沼泽中使用的大型风扇式空气推进船。例如大沼泽地中使用的那种船。也包括气垫船。
Bow Wash@@船浪@@@The waves pushed up by a boat or ship going through the water, a relatively clean recording.@@@船只航行时推开水面产生的波浪声，相对干净的录音。
Boats_Door@@船舶_门@@@Boat or Submarine doors. Some possible overlap with over DOOR categories or VEHICLES-DOOR.@@@船只或潜艇的门。可能与 Door 类别或 Vehicles-Door 类别有部分重叠。
Boats_Electric@@电动船@@@Any boat powered by electricity. Fairly rare. Possible a a radio controlled boat, or electric trolling motor.@@@任何由电力驱动的船只。相当罕见。可能是遥控船或电动拖钓马达。
Fishing@@捕鱼@@@Industrial fishing boats, crab boats, trawlers. Simple fishing boats to BOATS-MOTORBOAT.@@@工业渔船、捕蟹船、拖网渔船。简单的渔船归入 Boats-Motorboat 类别。
Boats_Horn@@船笛@@@Horns on boats and ships. Fog horns would go in HORNS-AIR category.@@@船只上的号角。雾号应归入 Horns-Air 类别。
Boats_Interior@@舱内@@@Interior ambiences on boats and ships, ferries, cruise ships, navy ships.@@@船只、轮船、渡轮、游轮、军舰的内部环境音。
Boats_Mechanism@@船舶_机械@@@All manner of boat mechanisms. Sailing ship rigging, pulleys, ropes, ship wheels. See also BOATS-DOOR.@@@各种船只机械装置。帆船的索具、滑轮、绳索、舵轮。另见 Boats-Door。
Boats_Military@@船舶_军用@@@Specifically military boats and ships, destroyers, aircraft carriers. Any military boat.@@@特指军用船只和舰艇，如驱逐舰、航空母舰。任何军用船只。
Motorboat@@摩托艇@@@General small boats, personal fishing boats, speedboats, pontoon boats. You average recreational boat.@@@一般小型船只、个人渔船、快艇、浮筒船。您常见的休闲船只。
Boats_Racing@@赛艇@@@Powered racing boats, not for human powered racing boats, those would go under BOATS-ROWING.@@@动力赛艇，不包括人力赛艇，后者应归入 Boats-Rowing。
Rowboat@@划艇@@@Canoes, rowboats, kayaks probably, human powered boats that use oars and paddles, even racing rowboats.@@@独木舟、划艇、皮划艇等，使用桨和橹的人力船只，包括赛艇。
Sailboat@@帆船@@@Composite recordings of rigging and sails, isolated elements to CLOTH-FLAP for close sails, or BOATS-MECHANISM for rigging.@@@索具和船帆的复合录音，帆的特写元素归入 Cloth-Flap，索具归入 Boats-Mechanism。
Ship@@大船@@@Large ship, passenger cruise ships, oil tankers, things relating to these.@@@大型船舶、客运游轮、油轮，以及与之相关的声音。
Boats_Steam@@蒸汽船@@@Old steam paddle boats, big steam ship sounds.@@@老式蒸汽明轮船，大型蒸汽船的声音。
Submarine@@潜艇@@@Relating to a submarine, include sonar pings. Classic 'Dive' alarm would go in ALARMS-SIREN with keyword Klaxon.@@@与潜艇相关的声音，包括声纳脉冲。经典的'下潜'警报应归入 Alarms-Siren 类别，关键词为 Klaxon。
Boats_Underwater@@船舶_水下@@@Specifically boats and ships recorded underwater, usually hydrophone recordings. SUBMARINES have their own subcategory.@@@特指在水下录制的船只和轮船声音，通常是水听器录音。潜艇有其自己的子类别。

Horns_Misc@@号角_其它@@@Horn sounds not fitting another category in this list, for example hunting calls. Not brass musical instruments which has it's own category in MUSICAL.@@@不适合本列表中其他类别的号角声，例如狩猎号角声。不包括铜管乐器，其在 Musical 类别下有独立分类。

Air Powered@@气压式@@@Air horns, as in handheld compressed air horns, huge factory air horns. A fog horn. BOATS-HORN has it's own category for ship and ferry horns, as does TRAINS-HORN.@@@气喇叭，例如手持压缩空气喇叭，巨大的工厂气喇叭。雾号。船只喇叭在 Boats-Horn 类别下，火车喇叭在 Trains-Horn 类别下。
Horns_Celebration@@欢庆用@@@Party horns, from small party horns to vuvuzelas.@@@派对喇叭，从小型派对喇叭到呜呜祖拉。
Traditional@@传统@@@Rams horns, conches, alpine horns, old traditional horns, medieval battle horns.@@@公羊角号，海螺号，阿尔卑斯号角，古老的传统号角，中世纪战斗号角。
Trains_Misc@@火车_其它@@@Train sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合本列表中其他类别的火车声音。
Trains_Brake@@火车_刹车@@@Screeching metalic train brake wheels, subway brakes. Usually a piercing sound.@@@尖锐刺耳的金属火车刹车轮声、地铁刹车声。通常是刺耳的声音。
Clack@@哐当@@@Train clacks isolated, constant clacking of trains passing or running.@@@独立的火车咔嗒声，火车经过或行驶时持续不断的咔嗒声。

Trains_Door@@火车_门@@@Train doors, sliding doors in passenger or freight trains. Some overlap with general DOORS category and possibly VEHICLES-DOOR.@@@火车门，客运或货运列车上的滑动门。与通用的 Doors（门）类别以及可能的 Vehicles-Door（车辆-门）类别有部分重叠。
Diesel@@内燃机车@@@Freight trains, large commercial diesel locomotives.@@@货运列车，大型商用柴油机车。
Trains_Electric@@电力机车@@@Commuter trains, elevated trains, light rail, SUBWAYS have their own category.@@@通勤列车、高架列车、轻轨。地铁有单独的类别。
High Speed@@高速列车@@@Hi-Tech trains, Maglev, monorails, Hyperloops, bullet trains.@@@高科技列车，磁悬浮列车、单轨列车、超级高铁、子弹头列车。
Trains_Horn@@火车_鸣笛@@@Train horns, subway horns. A steam train whistle would likely go into WHISTLES-MECHANICAL.@@@火车汽笛，地铁汽笛。蒸汽火车汽笛声可能归入 Whistles-Mechanical（机械哨声）。
Trains_Interior@@车厢内@@@Interior trains, from Diesel to Commuter, onboard train sounds.@@@列车内部声音，从柴油机车到通勤列车，列车上的声音。
Trains_Mechanism@@火车_机械@@@Coupling, decoupling and other mechanical sounds relating to trains. Levers, coal tender mechanics that are specific to a train.@@@列车连接、解挂及其他与列车相关的机械声音。列车特有的操纵杆、煤水车机械声。
Trains_Steam@@蒸汽火车@@@Old steam powered trains, big smoke stack chugs.@@@老式蒸汽动力火车，大烟囱发出的突突声。
Subway@@地铁@@@Subways, overtly 'underground' sounding trains, above group city trains probably best in TRAINS-ELECTRIC@@@地铁，明显带有"地下"感的列车声音；地面上的城市列车可能更适合归入 Trains-Electric（电力列车）。

Tram@@电车@@@Trolleys, cable cars trams and streetcars. A Tram is 'pulled' along a cable, so not self-powered. An electric tram would go to TRAINS-ELECTRIC.@@@有轨电车、缆车、电车和街车。有轨电车是沿缆索"被牵引"的，因此不是自带动力的。电动有轨电车应归入 Trains-Electric（电力列车）。
Vehicles_Misc@@车辆_其它@@@Vehicles sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的车辆声音。
Vehicles_Alarm@@车辆_警报@@@Not sirens, but just Car alarms, car alarm arm and disarm chirps.@@@非警报器，仅指汽车警报声、汽车警报器布防与撤防的提示音。
Vehicles_Antique@@古董车@@@Very old vehicles, such a Model A, Model T. Mainly cars, but possible other very old vehicles, trucks, tractors.@@@非常古老的车辆，例如 A 型车、T 型车。主要是汽车，但也可能包括其他非常古老的车辆、卡车、拖拉机。
Atv@@全地形车@@@All-Terrain Vehicle, three and four-wheelers, dune buggies, side by side.@@@全地形车，包括三轮和四轮车、沙滩车、并排式越野车。
Bicycle@@自行车@@@Bicycles, recumbent bikes, unicycles too. Any manner of pedal powered bicycle.@@@自行车、卧式自行车、独轮车。任何形式的脚踏动力自行车。
Vehicles_Brake@@车辆_刹车@@@Brake squeals and screeches of all kinds. TRAINS-BRAKE has its own category.@@@各种刹车尖啸声和刺耳声。火车刹车有独立类别。
Bus@@公交车@@@City buses, school buses, Greyhound buses.@@@城市公交车、校车、灰狗巴士。
Car@@汽车@@@All cars except overtly antique... add ERA to metadata to make searches easier. 1950s, 1960s...@@@除明显古董车外的所有汽车...在元数据中添加 Era 以便搜索，例如1950年代、1960年代...
Vehicles_Construction@@工程车@@@Cranes, bulldozers, paving vehicles, any construction related vehicle goes here.@@@起重机、推土机、铺路车，任何与建筑相关的车辆音效归于此。
Vehicles_Door@@车辆_门@@@Car, van, truck. Their doors all go here.@@@轿车、厢式货车、卡车。它们的车门音效均归于此。
Vehicles_Electric@@车辆_电动@@@Electric golf carts, electric scooters, electric cars. A Tesla. Any variety of electric vehicle, even electric motorcycles.@@@电动高尔夫球车、电动滑板车、电动汽车（如特斯拉）。任何类型的电动车，甚至电动摩托车。

Vehicles_Emergency@@紧急状态@@@Specifically emegency vehicles like Firetrucks, Ambulances, Police cars. Isolated sirens would go still to VEHICLES-SIREN.@@@具体来说，像消防车、救护车、警车这类紧急车辆。单独的警笛声仍归入 Vehicles-Siren。

Vehicles_Farm@@车辆_农场@@@I'd put farm tractors here, Some overlap possibly with CONSTRUCTION vehicles. A riding lawn mower would best to MACHINES-GARDEN maybe.@@@我会把农用拖拉机放在这里，可能与 Construction 车辆有些重叠。骑乘式割草机最好归入 Machines-Garden。
Freight@@货车@@@Big Rigs, Lorry, Semi-truck, U-Haul trucks, not for TRAINS, which have their own category.@@@大型卡车、货车、半挂车、U-Haul 搬家卡车，不包括火车，火车有单独的类别。

Generic By@@通用驰过@@@Generic or general vehicle pass bys, not 'traffic'. Bys for a specific car go with that car. For group passbys use AMBIENCE-TRAFFIC.@@@泛指或一般的车辆经过声，不是“交通”。特定车辆的经过声归入该车辆类别。成组车辆经过声使用 Ambience-Traffic。
Vehicles_Horn@@车辆_鸣笛@@@Specifically car and vehicles horns. BOATS-HORNS and TRAINS-HORN have their own category. Fog horn would go into HORNS-AIR.@@@特指汽车和车辆的喇叭声。船只喇叭和火车汽笛有各自的类别。雾笛归入 Horns-Air。

Vehicles_Interior@@车辆_车内@@@Interior recordings (ambiences) for car, truck, van interiors, from passenger cars, to back of a moving truck, riding inside a bus.@@@汽车、卡车、厢式货车内部的录音（环境声），从轿车内部到行驶中的卡车后部，再到公交车内部乘坐的声音。

Jalopy@@熄火@@@Backfiring, poorly running vehicle. False starts, sputtering... In foreign language translate to MALFUNCTIONING. See also CARTOON-VEHICLE.@@@车辆回火、运转不良。启动失败、噼啪作响……在其他语言中可译为 Malfunctioning。另请参见 Cartoon-Vehicle。
Vehicles_Mechanism@@设施@@@Various mechanisms on a vehicle, like seatbelts, window cranks, door locks.@@@车辆上的各种机械装置声音，如安全带、车窗摇柄、门锁。

Vehicles_Military@@车辆_军用@@@Overtly military ground vehicles. Tanks and military trucks for example. Armored Personnel Carriers, military Jeeps. See also AIRCRAFT-MILITARY and BOATS-MILITARY.@@@明显属于军事的地面车辆。例如坦克和军用卡车。装甲运兵车、军用吉普车。另请参见 Aircraft-Military 和 Boats-Military。
Motorcycle@@摩托车@@@Scooters, Motorcycles, Vespas, Motocross… All things 2 wheeled and powered. ATV goes to VEHICLES-ATV.@@@踏板车、摩托车、Vespa、越野摩托车……所有两轮动力车辆。全地形车归入 Vehicles-Atv。
Vehicles_Racing@@赛车@@@Racing cars or drag racing cars. Indy and Formula 1 cars, monster trucks, BOATS-RACING has its own category.@@@赛车或直线加速赛车。印地赛车和一级方程式赛车、大脚车。Boats-Racing 有单独的类别。

Vehicles_Siren@@警报车辆@@@Police, Firetruck, Ambulance sirens. Any vehicle siren. See also VEHICLES-EMERGENCY if engine sounds are present also.@@@警车、消防车、救护车的警笛声。任何车辆的警笛声。如果同时包含引擎声，另请参见 Vehicles-Emergency。
Skid@@轮胎摩擦@@@Tire skids, peel-outs. Other tire sounds go in VEHICLES-TIRES.@@@轮胎打滑、烧胎声。其他轮胎声音归入 Vehicles-Tires。
Suspension@@悬挂@@@Suspension squeaks and rattles, for any car, truck, semi. Suspensions springs. A car or truck on a very rough road.@@@悬挂系统的吱嘎声和咔嗒声，适用于任何汽车、卡车、半挂车。悬挂弹簧声。汽车或卡车在非常崎岖道路上的声音。
Tire@@轮胎打滑@@@Tire rolls on various surfaces, tire whines, no engine sounds, isolated tire sounds. A flat tire flop.@@@轮胎在不同路面滚动声、轮胎尖啸声、无引擎声、单独的轮胎声。轮胎漏气瘪掉的声音。
Truck Van & Suv@@厢式车@@@Passenger Trucks, pickup trucks, Vans and SUVs. Commercial trucks go in VEHICLES-FREIGHT.@@@客运卡车、皮卡、厢式货车和 Suv。商用卡车请归入“车辆-货运”类。
Utility@@工具@@@Golf carts, cushmans, traffic, gator, small motorized utility vehicles.@@@高尔夫球车、卡什曼车、交通车、Gator 车等小型机动化多功能车辆。
Wagon@@马车@@@Old wood wagon, horse drawn carts, carriages, buggies. A Stagecoach.@@@老式木制马车、马拉车、四轮马车、轻便马车。驿马车。
Window@@窗@@@Powered windows for any vehicles, crank windows should go in VEHICLES-MECHANISM.@@@任何车辆的电动窗。手摇窗应归入“车辆-机械装置”类。
Bullets_Misc@@子弹_其它@@@Bullet sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的子弹声音。
By@@飞过@@@Bullet pass bys in air, or underwater.@@@子弹在空中或水下飞过的声音。
Bullets_Impact@@击中@@@Bullet hits and impacts, on a bullet hit on any material from the ground, to wood, to a person.@@@子弹击中与冲击声，包括子弹击中地面、木材、人体等任何材料的声音。
Ricochet@@弹跳@@@Bullet ricochets, that classic old west 'ping' when a bullet bounces off something.@@@子弹跳弹声，即子弹弹开时那种经典的西部片"乒"声。
Shell@@弹壳@@@Bullet shells ejecting and dropping to the ground. See also GUNS-HANDLING for things like loading or unloading a gun.@@@子弹壳弹出并掉落地面。关于装填或卸下枪支等操作，另请参见 Guns-Handling。
Destruction_Misc@@拆除_其它@@@Destruction sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适用于此列表中其他类别的破坏音效。
Collapse@@倒塌@@@Buildings and large mixed complex collapses, a barn collapse, Godzilla pushing over a building.@@@建筑物和大型混合复杂结构倒塌声，如谷仓倒塌、哥斯拉推倒建筑物。

Destruction_Crash & Debris@@拆除_碎片@@@Mixed crashes, complex crashes involving more than one material. So a combo huge glass and metal crash. See also individual material categories like METAL, WOOD etc.@@@混合撞击声，涉及不止一种材料的复杂撞击声。例如玻璃和金属的巨大组合撞击声。另请参阅金属、木材等单一材料类别。
Explosions_Misc@@爆炸_其它@@@Explosion sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@爆炸声，不适合列表中其他类别。
Explosions_Designed@@爆炸_声音设计@@@Designed or stylized explosions and sweeteners. Hyperreal explosions.@@@设计或风格化的爆炸声和甜化音效。超现实的爆炸声。
Explosions_Real@@爆炸_真实@@@Real explosion recordings, realistic explosions, not overly stylized. (FIREWORKS has its own category)@@@真实的爆炸录音，逼真的爆炸声，不过度风格化。（烟花有单独的类别）
Fireworks_Misc@@烟花_其它@@@Firework sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不属于列表中其他类别的烟花声。
Commercial@@商业表演@@@Large commercial fireworks, mortars, as on the 4th of July. Full displays or single large mortars.@@@大型商业烟花、礼炮声，如美国独立日庆典上的。完整的烟花表演或单个大型礼炮。
Fireworks_Recreational@@自娱@@@Small store-bought, recreational fireworks, firecrackers and roman candles and bottle rockets.@@@小型商店购买的娱乐烟花、鞭炮、罗马烛光和瓶装火箭。
Guns_Misc@@枪炮_其它@@@Gun sounds not fitting another category in this list. BULLETS has its own category.@@@不适用于本列表中其他类别的枪声音效。子弹音效另有分类。
Guns_Antique@@古董枪@@@Old black powder weapons, muskets.@@@老式黑火药武器，滑膛枪。
Artillery@@火炮@@@Modern big guns, guns that launch shells. Not CANNONS which have their own group.@@@现代大型枪械，发射炮弹的枪械。火炮类另有独立分组。
Automatic@@自动化武器@@@Fully automatic capable weapons, even when firing singly. Machine guns.@@@全自动武器，包括单发模式。机枪类。
Cannon@@加农炮@@@Pirate and Civil War cannons, for modern artillery see GUNS-ARTILLERY.@@@海盗时期与南北战争时期火炮，现代火炮请见火炮分类。
Guns_Handle@@操作@@@Alongside GUN-MECHANISM, but specifically gun handling, grabs, holstering, dropping, catching.@@@与枪械机械声并列，但特指持枪动作音：抓取、入套、掉落、接住。
Guns_Hitech@@枪炮_高科技@@@Not quite a sci-fi Laser Gun, but something more advanced than a normal gun, a rail gun for example.@@@非科幻激光枪，指比普通枪械更先进的武器，例如电磁轨道炮。
Guns_Mechanism@@机枪@@@Gun various mechanical sounds, clips, cocking, bolt slides.@@@枪械各类机械声：弹匣、上膛、枪栓滑动。
Pistol@@手枪@@@Handguns and pistols.@@@手枪类武器。
Rifle@@步枪@@@Rifles, single shot and semi-automatic.@@@步枪类，包括单发与半自动型号。
Shotgun@@霰弹枪@@@Shotguns, single, dual, pump.@@@霰弹枪，单管，双管，泵动式。
Suppressed@@消音枪@@@Silenced Weapons, silencers.@@@消音武器，消音器。
Weapons_Misc@@武器_其它@@@Weapon sounds not fitting another category in this list.@@@不适合此列表中其他类别的武器声音。
Armor@@护甲@@@Knights armor movement, hits. Shields, chainmail armor, leather armor with buckles.@@@骑士盔甲移动、撞击声。盾牌、锁子甲、带扣的皮甲。
Arrow@@箭@@@Arrow slides, arrow impacts. An arrow by would likely be a SWOOSHES-SWISH. See also WEAPONS-BOW.@@@箭矢滑行、箭矢撞击声。箭矢飞过的声音可能属于 Swooshes-Swish。另请参见 Weapons-Bow。
Axe@@斧@@@Specifically a weaponized ax. Possible overlap with WEAPONS-SWORD or even WEAPON-POLEARM.@@@特指作为武器的斧头。可能与 Weapons-Sword 甚至 Weapon-Polearm 有重叠。
Blunt@@钝器@@@Blunt weapons, like maces and flails, but also nightsticks.@@@钝器，如钉头锤和连枷，也包括警棍。
Bow@@弓@@@Bows and Crossbows, articulation, twangs, bolts being loaded. Bow releases. See also WEAPON-ARROW.@@@弓与弩，操作声、弦声、装填弩箭声。放弦声。另请参见 Weapon-Arrow。
Knife@@刀@@@Smaller knives, WEAPONS-SWORDS has it own subcategory here.@@@较小的刀，Weapons-Swords 在此有独立的子类别。
Polearm@@矛@@@A long spear or long poled weapon with sharp components at the end, like a harpoon.@@@长矛或长杆武器，末端带有尖锐部件，如鱼叉。
Siege@@投石机@@@A siege weapon is a device designed to break or circumvent fortifications, catapults, trebuchets. Ancient artillery.@@@攻城武器是设计用于破坏或绕过防御工事的装置，如投石机、抛石机。古代火炮。
Sword@@剑@@@Swords, clashing, parrying. Sword rings and hits. STABS would go to GORE category. Sword draws, shings.@@@剑，碰撞、格挡声。剑鸣与击中声。刺击声归入 Gore 类别。拔剑声、锵锵声。
Whip@@鞭@@@Whip cracks. Make Indiana Jones proud.@@@鞭子抽打声。让印第安纳·琼斯感到自豪。
